title: Graphic Designer + Social Media Manager
description:
About the Role

We are Keenya Kelly LLC, a fast-moving social media education and strategy brand based in Houston, Texas. We teach entrepreneurs how to grow on TikTok and Instagram and monetize through content. Our founder, Keenya Kelly, is a TikTok and Instagram Growth Strategist with a business built over 10 years.



We are looking for a reliable, creative, and communicative full-time tea
mber who can handle both graphic design and social media management tasks. This is a remote, long-term role for someone who is proactive, meets deadlines, and communicates clearly.



What You Will Do

Graphic Design (approx. 50% of role):

Create social media graphics, banners, thumbnails, and branded templates in Canva

Design promotional materials for launches, webinars, and digital products

Maintain brand consistency across all visual assets

Resize and reformat existing designs for multiple platforms



Social Media Management (approx. 50% of role):

Write or lightly edit captions in our brand voice

Monitor comments and engage with the community

Track basic performance metrics and report weekly

Support content calendar execution during launches



What We Are Looking For

Experience with Canva (required) — Photoshop or Illustrator a plus

Familiarity with TikTok and Instagram — how the platforms work, what performs well

Strong written English communication skills

Ability to follow brand guidelines and take direction well

Highly responsive to
 and messages — we are a fast-moving team

Organized, reliable, and able to meet deadlines without being chased

Previous experience working with a personal brand or online business is a plus



How to Apply

To be considered for this role, you MUST complete the following short sample task along with your application. Applications without the completed task will not be reviewed.



SAMPLE TASK



Task 1 — Graphic Design

Create ONE social media graphic (1080x1080) in Canva for a fictional post promoting a our course 
 . Use any colors and design you like, but make it look professional and eye-catching. Export as a JPG or PNG and attach it to your application.



Design a carousel template that will go well with our brand 
/keenyakelly



Task 2 — Caption Writing

Write 2 caption options for the graphic above as if posting to Instagram. Each caption should include a hook, 2–3 sentences of value, a call to action, and 3–5 relevant hashtags.



Task 3 — Portfolio

Share a link to your portfolio OR attach 3–5 samples of past graphic design work. If you have managed social media accounts before, please also share the handle or a screenshot showing results.



A Note on Communication

This team moves quickly. We expect our tea
mbers to check
 and messages daily, respond within 24 hours, and complete agreed-upon tasks on time. If you are someone who values clear communication and takes ownership of your work, we would love to hear from you.



We look forward to reviewing your application

title: ocial Media & Affiliate Manager NEEDED – Fast-Growing DTC Lingerie Brand Scaling Hard
description:
Social Media & Affiliate Manager – Fast-Growing DTC Lingerie Brand (Remote)

About Us

Bella Bra is a fast-growing direct-to-consumer lingerie brand based in the Netherlands. We sell wireless bras and underwear that women actually love wearing. We're scaling aggressively and looking for someone who can own our creator and affiliate engine from top to bottom.

The Role

We're looking for a Social Media & Affiliate Manager to source high-quality content creators, build and manage our affiliate program, and help us scale word-of-mouth as a core growth channel. This is not a "post on social media" role. This is a partnerships and outreach role where your job is to find amazing creators, get them excited about the brand, and turn that into a system that consistently drives content and revenue.

What You'll Be Doing



Sourcing and vetting UGC creators, micro-influencers, and affiliates across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

Managing outreach at scale (DMs,
s, follow-ups) to build a pipeline of creator partnerships

Running and optimizing our affiliate program (tracking performance, managing payouts, maintaining relationships)

Negotiating rates and deliverables with creators

Coordinating with our creative team to make sure creator content fits our brand and ad pipeline

Tracking KPIs: number of creators onboarded, content delivered, affiliate revenue generated

Building SOPs and systems so this function runs smoothly and scales



You're a Great Fit If You



Have 2+ years of experience in influencer outreach, affiliate management, or creator partnerships (DTC/ecommerce strongly preferred)

Know how to find great creators, not just big ones. You have an eye for authentic content that converts.

Are highly organized and can manage 50+ creator relationships without dropping balls

Communicate clearly and professionally in English

Are comfortable using tools like Shopify, affiliate platforms (GoAffPro, Refersion, or similar), and project management tools (we use ClickUp + Slack)

Are proactive and don't need to be micromanaged. You see a gap, you fill it.

Bonus: experience in the lingerie, fashion, or beauty space



Details



Full-time contractor role (remote)

You'll report directly to the founder

We move fast and expect ownership. If you like autonomy and building things from scratch, you'll love this.



To Apply

Send a short message covering:



Answer all questions in this form:





We're not looking for a long cover letter. Just show us you're the real deal.

title: AI Agents & Automation Assistant
description:
The LLM & AI Automation Analyst is responsible for managing, monitoring, and continuously improving LLM-powered systems, AI agents, and automations, including chatbot applications.



This role sits at the intersection of AI, data, automation, and operations. You will ensure AI systems deliver accurate, reliable, and context-aware outputs by maintaining knowledge bases, refining prompts, monitoring performance, and building automations and reports. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys analytical thinking, process optimization, and working with evolving AI systems.





Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:

-Maintain and improve LLM-powered agents, including chatbot workflows, prompts, and response logic



-Design, test, and refine prompts to improve accuracy, consistency, and behavior



-Validate agent outputs across edge cases and real-world scenarios



-Curate, organize, and validate structured knowledge bases, FAQs, and internal documentation used by AI systems



-Ensure knowledge sources remain accurate, up to date, and logically structured



-Review AI conversations and agent outputs to identify errors, gaps, and logic failures



-Define, track, and document quality metrics for AI outputs



-Propose corrective actions based on recurring issues



-Track AI usage, accuracy, resolution rates, escalation rates, and user satisfaction



-Analyze trends and root causes behind performance changes



-Translate insights into actionable improvements



-Build formulas, scripts, and automations to improve AI workflows, reporting, and monitoring



-Use Google Apps Script and APIs to automate repetitive processes



-Assist in creating dashboards and reports to monitor AI performance and adoption



-Ensure leadership has clear visibility into system health and impact



-Maintain clear documentation of AI logic, workflows, automations, and improvement roadmap



-Partner with Data, Operations, HR, and Leadership to align AI capabilities with business needs



-Proactively identify opportunities to improve AI accuracy, efficiency, and reliability







Qualifications

Required:

-1+ year experience working with LLMs, chatbots, or AI-powered systems



-Strong proficiency in Google Sheets for analysis, tracking, and reporting



-1+ year experience using formulas and Google Apps Script



-Ability to analyze AI conversations, logs, and performance metrics



-Experience with prompt engineering and evaluation



-Strong attention to detail and quality assurance mindset



-Understanding of data privacy, access control, and responsible AI practices



-Clear written communication and cross-functional collaboration skills



Nice to Have

-Python for automation or data analysis



-Basic SQL for querying logs or analytics data



-Experience with APIs (REST, JSON)



-Familiarity with BI tools or BigQuery







Technical Stack



Languages

-JavaScript (Google Apps Script)

-Python (optional but valuable)

-SQL (basic)



Tools

-Google Apps Script

-Google Sheets Automation

-LLM / AI platforms (internal or third-party)

-API integrations (REST, JSON)



Data & Reporting

-Google Sheets

-BigQuery (optional)

-Dashboards / BI tools





Key Traits

-Highly analytical and detail-oriented



-Curious and passionate about AI and automation



-Process-driven and optimization-focused



-Proactive and self-directed



-Strong ownership mindset



-Comfortable working with ambiguity and evolving systems



 

Benefits & Perks:

-Strong focus on work-life balance



-Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI and automation systems



-Direct impact on product, operations, and customer experience



-Long-term growth path in AI, Data, and Automation



All set to dive into this new adventure?

Please fill out the form so we can proceed with your application:



wkf.ms/4pPRX7N



(Remember to choose AI Agents & Automation Assistant from the dropdown so your application won't get lost!)

title: Canva Wedding Template Designer
description:
Hi! We are a fast-growing digital wedding stationery brand based in Australia. We design and sell beautiful interactive wedding invitation templates — couples buy our templates, customise them in minutes, and share a link with their guests as a live website. Our templates are built in Canva and published using Canva's website feature.



We are looking for a talented Canva designer who has a strong eye for colour, beautiful aesthetics, and genuine attention to detail. This is a long-term retainer role — not a one-off gig.



What You Will Do

• Design 20-40 original Canva wedding website templates per month

• Each template is a multi-page Canva design with scroll animations, floral elements, envelope reveal effect, and RSVP section

• Use Canva Magic Media (AI) to generate original floral and watercolour elements

• Deliver 3–4 PNG mockup preview images per template for use on Etsy and social media

• Work from a detailed brief we provide each week — colour palette, mood, style references

• Deliver Canva share link + mockup files on time every week



What We Are Looking For

• Strong Canva skills — you use it daily and know it inside out

• Excellent colour theory — you know intuitively what colour combinations feel premium and beautiful

• Obsessive attention to detail — spacing, alignment, font pairing all matter to you

• Experience with wedding, floral, luxury, or lifestyle design aesthetics

• Reliable and deadline-driven — consistent weekly output is essential

• Good English communication



Nice To Have

• Portfolio showing wedding or invitation design

• Familiarity with Etsy digital products

• Experience creating social media mockup images



Pay & Terms

• Base retainer: $300–500 AUD per month (paid fortnightly via Wise or PayPal)

• Rate depends on experience and portfolio quality

• Performance bonuses: $25 for any template hitting 50+ sales, $50 for 100+ sales

• Rate reviewed every 3 months — we grow, you grow

• Flexible hours — work when it suits you, we care about quality and deadlines not clock-watching



How To Apply

Please send a proposal that includes:

• A link to your portfolio or 3–5 samples of your best Canva design work

• At least one example of wedding, floral, luxury or invitation design

• Your answer to this question: "How do you choose a colour palette from scratch — walk me through your process"

• Your weekly availability and timezone



We want something like this: 
nva.site/burgundy-olive-demo



If you show us a template that you have created similar to this, then you will be placed above others in the hiring process (High chance of you getting hired!)

title: Operations & Network Growth Coordinator
description:
Operations & Network Growth Coordinator



Juming Delmas Studios



Juming Delmas Studios is seeking an Operations & Network Growth Coordinator to support the operations, analytics tracking, and partnership development for our growing client base and the JDS Podcast Network.



This role ensures that all client systems, reporting, and outreach initiatives run smoothly while helping expand the network through strategic partnerships and sponsorship opportunities.



---



# Position Details



Title: Operations & Network Growth Coordinator

Company:  Juming Delmas Studios

Schedule: Part-Time / Contractor

Focus:** Operations, analytics reporting, and network growth



---



# Role Overview



The Operations & Network Growth Coordinator is responsible for maintaining the operational systems that support our podcast clients and the JDS Podcast Network.



This includes client onboarding, analytics reporting, content oversight, contractor coordination, newsletters, and partnership outreach.



This role ensures that both clients and internal systems remain organized, accountable, and growth-focused.



---



# Core Responsibilities



## Client Analytics Reporting



Track and report performance data for all clients and network shows.



Responsibilities include:



• Compile weekly analytics reports for each client

• Send weekly analytics summaries to clients

• Prepare and send monthly analytics reports

• Monitor podcast and social media performance metrics

• Ensure analytics data is properly tracked and stored



---



## Content Monitoring & Platform Oversight



Oversee client content distribution and ensure all platforms remain active and updated.



Responsibilities include:



• Review Metricool dashboard weekly

• Add and manage new clients within Metricool

• Ensure scheduled content is properly published

• Check for **missing posts, scheduling errors, or platform issues

• Verify content is distributed across all client platforms



---



## Client & Contractor Onboarding



Coordinate onboarding for new clients and contractors.



Responsibilities include:



• Sending client contracts and onboarding documents

• Sending contractor agreements and documentation

• Setting up new client folders and systems

• Ensuring clients are added to internal systems



---



## Content Organization & Archiving



Maintain organized file systems across all projects.



Responsibilities include:



• Manage Dropbox folder organization for each client and Go Highlevel

• Upload and archive content properly

• Send annual Dropbox archive files to clients

• Maintain structured file management across projects



---



## Newsletter Management



Manage
 communications for podcast and client audiences.



Responsibilities include:



• Send monthly newsletters for each client

• Send podcast episode release newsletters

• Maintain
 lists and scheduling

• Coordinate content announcements



---



## Partnership & Sponsorship Outreach



Assist with expanding the JDS Podcast Network through strategic outreach.



Responsibilities include:



• Identify potential brand sponsors and partners

• Conduct outreach to potential sponsors

• Assist with **network partnership opportunities

• Help coordinate brand collaborations



---



# Recommended Additional Responsibilities (To Help Grow the Network)



To strengthen the JDS Podcast Network, this role should also support:



### Podcast Guest Outreach



• Identify and contact potential podcast guests

• Maintain a guest pipeline for network shows



### Network Collaboration Tracking



• Coordinate guest swaps between network podcasts

• Track collaborations across shows



### Sponsorship Lead Tracking



• Maintain a sponsor CRM list

• Track outreach conversations and potential deals



### Network Growth Tracking



• Track total **network podcast growth metrics

• Monitor audience growth across all shows



---



# Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is:



• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working with analytics and dashboards

• Experienced with social media and podcast platforms

• Strong with communication and outreach

• Interested in media, podcasting, and digital marketing



---



# Impact of This Role



This role is critical to ensuring that:



• Clients receive consistent performance reporting

• Content systems remain organized and efficient

• The JDS Podcast Network continues to grow through partnerships and sponsorships



---



# Apply



Interested candidates should submit:



• Resume

• Relevant experience in operations, marketing, or media



Contact:

title: Full Time Remote Customer Support Assistant
description:
We are building a distributed support team and are looking for a Customer Support Assistant who takes written communication seriously and values consistency in their work. This is a full-time remote position designed for someone who wants dependable income, clear expectations, and the chance to grow within a structured environment over time.



This role is not project-based or temporary. We are looking for someone who wants stability, is comfortable working set hours, and understands that strong support is built on reliability and attention to detail.



You will spend your workday handling customer conversations through written messages. Your responsibility is to provide clear, accurate, and professional responses while maintaining a friendly tone. You will work within defined guidelines, manage several conversations at the same time, and ensure users receive timely and helpful replies. Part of the role also involves flagging recurring issues, technical problems, or useful feedback so the team can improve processes and systems.

Full onboarding and training are provided before you begin working independently.



This role requires strong written English and a typing speed of at least 60 words per minute. You must have a reliable internet connection of 50-100 Mbps or higher. A dependable laptop or desktop computer with at least 8 GB of RAM is required.



You should be available full-time for a consistent schedule of eight hours per day, six days per week. We value people who are detail-oriented, professional in their communication, dependable in meeting expectations, and open to feedback and improvement.



Previous experience in customer support, chat-based roles, or remote work is helpful but not required.



The hourly pay for this position ranges from 4 to 6 USD, depending on experience and performance.

In addition to base pay, there are performance-based bonuses, regular reviews, and opportunities for raises. Team members who consistently perform well can grow into higher-responsibility and higher-paying roles over time.



Why Join Us?

You’ll be working remotely in a structured environment with clear systems, training, and expectations. This role is ideal for someone who wants long-term stability rather than short-term gigs, and who values growth through consistent performance.



Apply now by sending us a message with all relevant information mentioned above and we look forward to having you!

title: Elite ISA (Inside Sales Agent) – Real Estate Industry – Perfect English Required
description:
We are looking for an exceptional Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to join our team.



You will be speaking directly with real estate broker owners and real estate companies in the United States, helping them discover solutions that improve their business.



This role is not high-pressure sales.

It is about service, curiosity, and starting valuable conversations.



You must speak excellent, natural English that sounds very comfortable to American business owners.



If you love helping people and enjoy professional conversations with successful entrepreneurs, this could be a great role for you.



About Our Company



We are the creators of Paperless Pipeline, a software platform used by thousands of real estate professionals across the United States.



Our mission is simple:



Help real estate brokers run better businesses.



We serve brokerage owners, team leaders, and agents across the country.



The founder of the company is stepping back into a more active leadership role and wants to personally reconnect with our customers.



That’s where you come in.



Your First Mission



Your first responsibility will be calling our 1,800 existing customers and booking 15-minute conversations with the founder.



These are friendly check-in conversations, not sales calls.



Your job is simply to:



• Call brokerage owners

• Thank them for being customers

• Ask if they’d like a quick conversation with the founder

• Book a 15-minute appointment



The purpose is to listen and improve the product.



Future Responsibilities



Once the first phase is complete, your role will expand to include revenue-generating activities.



Your role will likely become 50% relationship calls / 50% opportunity creation.



Examples include:



Customer Success Calls

• Calling existing customers

• Booking founder conversations

• Asking how we can improve the product



Growth Calls

• Calling real estate brokerages

• Introducing our platform

• Booking demo appointments with our team



Your role is to create high-quality conversations.



Who This Job Is Perfect For



You might be perfect for this role if you:



• Speak excellent, natural English

• Sound comfortable speaking with American professionals

• Enjoy professional phone conversations

• Are curious and enjoy asking good questions

• Like helping people succeed

• Are organized and dependable

• Want a long-term role with a growing company



Experience in real estate, appointment setting, or ISA work is a major plus.



Requirements



Please apply only if you meet these requirements:

Top performers will have opportunities to move into larger revenue-generating roles.

This role requires overlap with U.S. business hours.



Expected schedule:



U.S. daytime hours (Central Time).



How To Apply



To apply, please include:

Final Note

title: Appointment Setter (SDR) Needed
description:
If you're hungry for growth, opportunity, and impact - and want to join our small, high-performing remote team, this role may be for you...



We’re a consulting business with a remote team across the globe. We exist to grow the businesses of our clients, who are world-class online fitness coaches. This role involves setting appointments for sales reps to enrol members into our consulting programs..



If hired as an appointment setter, you will be responsible for contacting & following-up with both inbound and outbound leads. The purpose of this role is to connect with potential prospects for the our consulting services, quickly qualify them to see if they are a good fit for the program, and then set appointments with them.



This position is perfect for someone who is starting off in sales and looking for a way to earn their stripes. But if you already have experience with Appointment Setting, this is a total bonus.



With this role, full training will be given so being willing to learn a proven process and then stick to it is crucial to your success.



Here are some of the details you need to know:



- You’ll handle 20-30 conversations per day across multiple platforms

- Work remotely & set your own schedule 

- Commission only through the trial phase then base + commission once established in the role

- You need to be comfortable spending a lot of time on your phone and computer (Access to a computer is a must-have)

- Must be fluent in written English



This role is best suited to people who are passionate about digital marketing, coaching and courses. 



To succeed you must be:

? Self-starter -- you are comfortable working 100% remotely, managing your own time and multiple conversations at once

? Driven -- competitive and confident with chasing down leads and moving prospects to the next stage to reach sales targets for our company

? Adaptable -- Able to multitask and prioritize under ever-changing needs and schedules

? Coachable -- you are willing to participate in ongoing training and constantly push yourself to get better and better

? Proactive -- you strive to get ahead of a problem, instead of waiting for it to

become a full-blown fire



If you feel this level of engagement is not right for you or that you’re not willing or able to participate with us at this level, we are not a good fit for you.



If you're ready to go ALL IN complete the application below:

title: Graphic designer (Future creative strategist)
description:
Graphic Designer (Growth Path Into Marketing & Creative Direction)



We’re looking for a skilled graphic designer to join our creative team.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys designing but also wants to learn the marketing side behind high-performing ads.



You’ll work inside a team of designers and collaborate directly with our marketing department. If you want long-term growth, structure, and a chance to develop into a more strategic creative role, this is for you.



What You’ll Do



Create 20 high-quality static ads per day (product shots, collages, lifestyle scenes, simple UGC-style frames)



Work in a team of multiple graphic designers



Use Gemini / Canva / Photoshop (or your preferred workflow)



Design ads that look trustworthy, clean, and authentic



Help brainstorm new creative angles and concepts



Follow brand guidelines and maintain a consistent visual identity



Use performance feedback to improve your designs



Salary & Bonus System



Base salary: $400/month



Bonus system: the best-performing designer can DOUBLE their salary



Bonuses are based on creative performance and impact



Clear structure, transparent system



Top creatives get rewarded heavily



This isn’t a typical low-level design job — we invest in designers who show growth and ownership.



What You’ll Learn



You don’t need previous marketing experience — you will learn it on the job.



You’ll gain real performance marketing knowledge, including:



What makes an ad convert



How to build creatives using trust / scarcity / authority / offer principles



How to read basic performance data (CTR, CPC, Hook Rate)



How to think in marketing angles, not just visuals



How to build creatives for older demographics (40–70+)



How real ecommerce brands scale through creative testing



If you want to grow from a designer ? into someone who understands marketing ? and eventually creative direction, this role gives you that path.



Who We’re Looking For



A graphic designer with a good eye and strong aesthetic taste



Able to design fast while keeping quality high



Comfortable giving and receiving feedback



Interested in learning the marketing strategy behind your work



Reliable, consistent, and proactive



Someone who wants long-term growth, not just tasks



Bonus Skills



(Not required, but helpful)



Meta/Facebook ad experience



Photoshop or advanced Canva knowledge



Ecommerce or jewelry ad experience



Understanding of performance metrics



Why Join Us



100% remote



Work inside a structured creative team, not alone



Clear expectations, clear goals



Fast feedback loops



A stable brand with long-term growth



A real opportunity to move into creative direction + marketing if you grow



This role is for someone who takes pride in their work and wants to be part of a bigger creative engine — not just a production designer.

title: Spreadsheet & Data Specialist Pathway Into E-commerce Finance Global Jewelry Brand
description:
Spreadsheet & Data Specialist

Pathway Into E-commerce Finance

Global Jewelry Brand



We are looking for someone who truly enjoys working with spreadsheets and data.



This role is designed for a spreadsheet expert who wants to step into the world of e-commerce finance and learn how financial operations work inside a fast-growing global online business.



Our company operates internationally and processes thousands of transactions across payment processors, banks, advertising platforms, and suppliers. Because of this, accurate data tracking and reconciliation are extremely important.



If you enjoy building structured spreadsheets, analyzing numbers, spotting inconsistencies, and improving data systems, this is an excellent opportunity to apply those skills in a real e-commerce environment.



Over time, this role can grow into deeper financial operations and finance management within the company.



What You Will Be Responsible For



Record daily financial activity such as:



• Sales

• Refunds

• Chargebacks

• Advertising spend

• Cost of goods sold

• Operational expenses



Maintain and update the Payout Tracker



• Track payouts from different payment processors

• Tag payout statuses

• Record any fees or charges related to payouts



Verify financial transactions across different platforms



• Bank accounts

• Payment processors

• Finance platforms



Record any expenses, outflows, or adjustments found during verification.



Reconcile payouts from multiple processors and ensure payouts are correctly scheduled and tracked.



Track vendor payables and advertising spend payables.



Analyze monthly financial charges such as:



• Processor fees

• Platform charges

• Total payout summaries



Prepare financial reports including:



• Rolling Balance Sheet (monthly)

• Profit & Loss reports

• Cash Flow reports



Identify inconsistencies in financial data and investigate where differences originate.



Requirements



Strong experience with Excel or Google Sheets.



Comfortable working with formulas such as:



• SUMIFS

• VLOOKUP

• XLOOKUP

• Similar spreadsheet functions



Highly detail-oriented and able to spot inconsistencies in large datasets.



Strong logical and analytical thinking when reviewing transaction data.



Comfortable working with large spreadsheets and financial information.



Organized and structured in how you manage data.



Willing to learn and open to continuous improvement.



What This Role Offers



Opportunity to turn strong spreadsheet skills into real e-commerce finance experience.



Exposure to the financial operations of a global e-commerce brand.



Hands-on experience working with:



• Payment processors

• Advertising spend tracking

• Financial reconciliation

• Cash flow reporting



A pathway to grow into deeper finance and operations roles within the company.



If you enjoy working with spreadsheets, organizing complex data, and want to learn how financial systems work inside a large e-commerce company, this role is a strong opportunity to develop those skills.

title: Registration Coordinator for Behavioral Health Outpatient Services
description:
Position Overview:

The Registration Coordinator at plays a crucial role in supporting the administrative functions of our organization by overseeing client and participant registration processes. This position ensures smooth operations by managing data entry, maintaining accurate records, and providing excellent customer service to clients and staff. The ideal candidate will be organized, detail-oriented, and possess strong communication skills to facilitate the on boarding and registration of participants in various programs.



Key Responsibilities:

    Client Registration Management: Handle all aspects of client and participant registration, including data collection, entry, and verification to ensure accuracy.

    Record Maintenance: Maintain accurate and up-to-date client and program participant records, ensuring data confidentiality and compliance with regulatory standards.

    Customer Support: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients during the registration process, responding to inquiries via phone,
, or in person with professionalism and clarity.

    Program Coordination: Work closely with program staff to ensure that all registration materials are properly processed and participants are ready to begin services.

    Billing and Documentation: Assist in preparing registration-related documents, tracking client payments, and coordinating with the billing department as needed.

    Report Generation: Compile and distribute registration status reports to management and relevant staff to provide updates on participant on boarding.

    Scheduling: Coordinate with other departments to schedule intake appointments, orientations, and any other relevant meetings as part of the registration process.



Qualifications:

    Education: High school diploma or equivalent required; an associate’s degree or higher in a relevant field preferred.

    Experience: At least 1 year of experience in a clerical, administrative, or customer service role. Experience in a healthcare, behavioral health, or developmental disabilities setting is a plus.

    Technical Skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook) and experience with data entry and record-keeping systems.

    Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a customer-focused attitude.

    Organization: Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines efficiently.

    Attention to Detail: Exceptional accuracy in data management and document preparation.

    Interpersonal Skills: Ability to work collaboratively with tea
mbers and interact professionally with clients and staff.



Working Conditions:

    This is a full-time position.

    Some evening or weekend availability may be required based on program needs.

title: Senior Pinterest Media Buyer & Creative Strategist (High-Spend Experience Required)
description:
We are an established e-commerce brand looking for a top-tier Pinterest Media Buyer who lives and breathes the platform. This is not a role for a general social media manager or a beginner testing the waters. We need a seasoned expert who knows exactly how to drive profitable traffic, design scroll-stopping creatives, and scale campaigns aggressively.



If you do not have a proven track record of managing large ad spends and working with big e-commerce clients, please do not apply.



Your Responsibilities:



End-to-End Campaign Management: Launch, manage, and optimize Pinterest ad campaigns for maximum ROAS.



Creative Strategy & Execution: Design and produce high-converting Pinterest creatives (Standard Pins, Video Pins, Idea Pins) based on deep knowledge of what works specifically on this platform.



Aggressive Scaling: Identify winning campaigns and scale them profitably without breaking the CPA.



Data Analysis: Continuously monitor dashboards, run A/B tests on creatives and copy, and pivot strategies based on hard data.



Requirements:



Deep, specialized knowledge of the Pinterest Ads Manager and Pinterest organic/paid algorithms.



Strong graphic design and video editing skills specifically tailored to the Pinterest aesthetic.



Proven experience managing high-spend accounts for significant e-commerce clients (experience in highly visual niches like home decor, women's fashion, or beauty/skincare is a major advantage).



A highly analytical mindset with the ability to turn data into actionable scaling strategies.



MANDATORY APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY):



We strictly filter our applicants. To be considered for this position, your application MUST include the following:



Verifiable Screenshots: You must attach screenshots from your actual Pinterest Ad accounts showing your ad spend, scaling phases, and ROAS.



Client Portfolio: You must provide the names and direct website links of the stores and big clients you have worked with.



Creative Examples: A link to a portfolio or folder showing Pinterest creatives you have personally designed that were successful.



Note: If your application does not include the screenshots AND the specific store links, it will be immediately deleted without review. No exceptions.



To prove you have read this entire post, please start your application message with the exact phrase: "scale"

title: Podcast Trailer Editor (Video Editor)
description:
Job Title: Podcast Trailer Editor



REQUIRED - FILL OUT THIS FORM IN FULL FOR YOUR APPLICATION TO BE CONSIDERED: 



Location: Remote Working 



Experience: 2–3 Years Minimum (Required)



Position Overview

We are seeking a dedicated Podcast Trailer Editor to craft impactful trailers from our long-form podcast content. You will collaborate with our in-house team to find the strongest hooks, build engaging narratives, and deliver edits for YouTube, Shorts, Instagram Reels, TikTok and X. The ideal candidate has a sharp story sense, excellent pacing, strong audio skills, and proven experience editing podcast content. Familiarity with the trading and finance niche is a bonus.



Responsibilities 

• Watch long-form recordings and identify powerful hooks, headlines and CTAs for impactful trailers.

• Edit tight, high-retention impactful trailers and cut-downs (15–120 seconds) for Shorts, Reels, TikTok, X and YouTube preview intros.

• Add dynamic captions and kinetic text that match brand guidelines and improve retention.

• Clean and mix audio: remove filler, reduce noise, balance levels and loudness-normalise.

• Colour correct and lightly grade to match our studio look.

• Source and place relevant B-roll or screen recordings to reinforce key ideas.

• Deliver correctly formatted masters across aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 16:9) and platform specs.

• Manage multiple edits simultaneously, meeting tight deadlines and same-day turnarounds when required.

• Maintain organised project files & carry out any revisions in a timely manner.

• QC every export for typos, sync, audio pops, caption accuracy and brand consistency.



Requirements

• Very strong communication with quick responses in messaging applications.

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro. Competent in After Effects for titles and light motion; Audition or Resolve/Fairlight for audio.

• Demonstrable experience editing impactful trailers and shorts for podcasts, creators or media brands.

• Knowledge of social platform best practices, delivery specs and caption workflows.

• Strong story editing, pacing and beat-matching with music and SFX.

• Minimum of 2–3 years of professional video editing experience.

• Portfolio showing impactful trailers, podcast cut-downs and long-to-short transformations.

• Strong organisational and multitasking abilities with keen attention to detail.

• Reliable hardware and internet suitable for 4K multicam projects and rapid renders.



Nice to Have

• Experience with 
 & Notion.

• Understanding of trading or forex topics and terminology.



IMPORTANT

• Please fill out the attached form in FULL DETAIL. Any candidates that fail to do this on application will be ignored.

title: VFX / Motion Designer - Trading Animations
description:
Job Title: VFX / Motion Designer - Trading Animations

Location: Remote Working

Experience: 2–3 Years Minimum (Required)

Working Hours: 40 hours a week (9:00am - 5:00pm UK)



***PLEASE FILL OUT THIS FORM TO APPLY - 



Position Overview

We are seeking a VFX / Motion Designer to create clear, engaging animations that explain trading ideas. Most of your work will be in Adobe After Effects. You will make custom animations for candlesticks, chart patterns and price movement that help viewers understand what is happening on a chart. A basic understanding of trading is helpful. Experience in Blender or Cinema 4D is a bonus, not a requirement.



Some of our projects: 







Responsibilities

• Design simple, on-brand animations for candlesticks, OHLC bars, volume and common chart patterns like flags, wedges and head and shoulders.

• Animate price movement on a chart, including wicks, gaps, support and resistance, trend lines, breakouts, stop loss and target boxes.

• Add clear on-screen labels and callouts to highlight key points and numbers.

• Create reusable After Effects project files so editors can change colours, labels and timings quickly.

• Build short title screens, name labels, chapter cards, transitions and end screens that match our brand.

• Add short emphasis captions or bold words when needed for clarity.

• Prepare versions in different sizes for YouTube, Shorts, Reels and TikTok (16:9, 9:16, 1:1).

• Keep files tidy with clear names and folders, and include a simple handover note for editors.

• Check each export for spelling, readability on mobile, smooth motion, clean edges and brand colours.

• Work with producers and editors to plan the visuals and make quick improvements from feedback.



Requirements

• Very strong communication with quick responses in messaging apps.

• Advanced skills in Adobe After Effects, including keyframing, shapes, masks, timing and basic tracking.

• Portfolio that shows chart or candlestick animations, or clean data and infographic-style motion work.

• Basic knowledge of trading visuals and terms such as candles, support and resistance, trends and patterns.

• Good eye for layout and typography so on-screen information is easy to read.

• Well organised file management and a consistent way of working.

• Reliable computer and internet for rendering and file transfers.



Nice to Have

• Blender or Cinema 4D for simple 3D text or logo moves and basic camera moves.

• DaVinci Resolve or Fusion experience.

• Comfort using simple tools or plugins that speed up work.

• Familiarity with 
, Google Drive, Slack and Notion.

• Ability to show heatmaps, order flow or indicators in a clean and readable way.



IMPORTANT

• Please include a portfolio link. Applications without a portfolio link will be ignored. Include at least 2 examples of candlestick or chart animations if possible.



Additional

• Experience creating visuals for trading, finance or investment content is a strong bonus and will strengthen your application.

title: Shopify Product Administrator
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a meticulous and experienced Shopify Product Administrator to join Brand New Bathrooms, a growing UK eCommerce retailer specialising in bathroom furniture, baths, showers, toilets, radiators, tiles, and accessible bathing equipment.

This is a dedicated product-focused role. You will be responsible for the accurate uploading, updating, and maintenance of our entire product catalogue on Shopify. This is not a customer service position — your time will be spent entirely on product data, content, and catalogue management.

You must be available Monday-Friday, 9am–5pm UK time. There may be flexibility after a few months to move to local hours but not until a full understanding of how our product pages look has been gained.



Key Responsibilities

Product Uploading & Data Entry

• Upload new products to Shopify accurately and completely, including titles, descriptions, specifications, pricing, and variants

• Source and format product images to Shopify requirements, including resizing and basic editing where needed

• Set up product variants (size, colour, finish, etc.) and ensure all variant combinations are correct and complete

• Assign products to correct collections, add relevant tags, and configure metafields as required

• Input and maintain product weights, dimensions, and shipping details



Product Updating & Maintenance

• Update existing product listings with new pricing, revised descriptions, updated images, and specification changes

• Process supplier datapacks and price lists to identify and action changes across the catalogue

• Monitor and maintain stock status — marking products as in stock, out of stock, or discontinued as appropriate

• Identify and correct errors or inconsistencies across the catalogue (missing images, incorrect specs, broken variants)

• Carry out periodic catalogue audits to ensure quality and accuracy across all listings



Content & SEO Basics

• Write or lightly edit product descriptions to ensure they are clear, accurate, and consistent in tone

• Apply basic SEO principles to product titles, descriptions, and meta fields

• Maintain collection page content and ensure products appear in the correct categories



Administration & Reporting

• Maintain a product update log, tracking what has been uploaded, amended, or removed

• Work from supplier data files (Excel/CSV) to process bulk updates efficiently

• Follow detailed SOPs and checklists, and flag issues or discrepancies to the manager

• Use Trello or similar tools to manage and prioritise your daily workload



Required Experience & Skills

• 2+ years of hands-on experience working in the Shopify admin, with a strong understanding of products, variants, collections, metafields, and the media library

• Proven track record of uploading and managing large product catalogues in eCommerce

• Excellent data entry skills with very high accuracy — errors in product data directly affect sales and customer trust

• Proficient in working with Excel and CSV files, including filtering, sorting, and cross-referencing supplier data

• Able to read and interpret supplier datasheets and technical product specifications

• Comfortable using tools such as Trello, Google Sheets, and Google Drive

• Basic image handling skills — comfortable resizing and formatting product images using Canva or similar

• Excellent written English — product descriptions must be clear, professional, and consistent

• Strong understanding of product data quality and what makes a good, conversion-ready product listing



Desirable Skills

• Experience with bathroom, homewares, or interiors products

• Experience processing bulk product uploads using CSV import tools

• Familiarity with Shopify metafields and how they are used for structured product data

• Basic knowledge of on-page SEO as it applies to product and collection pages

• Experience working with multiple supplier brands and managing a multi-brand catalogue



Soft Skills

• Highly organised and methodical — able to handle large volumes of product data without losing accuracy

• Exceptional attention to detail — you take pride in getting every field right, every time

• Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision during UK business hours

• Reliable and consistent — you meet deadlines and flag issues early rather than letting them slip

• Open to learning new processes and improving catalogue workflows over time



Technical Requirements

• Reliable, fast internet connection (minimum 20 Mbps download / 10 Mbps upload)

• A reliable computer with a modern browser — Chrome recommended

• Quiet, professional working environment during UK hours

• Ability to take screenshots and screen recordings when reporting issues

• Access to Microsoft Excel, Microsoft Office and



Why Join Us

This is an opportunity to become a core part of a growing UK eCommerce brand where your work is directly visible — every product you upload is live on our website and in front of customers.

You will be supported with thorough onboarding, detailed SOPs, and ongoing guidance. As the business grows, so do the opportunities: we offer performance-based salary reviews and the chance to grow into a senior catalogue or eCommerce operations role as the team expands.



How to Apply

Please submit the following with your application:

• Your CV / Resume

• A brief cover note explaining your Shopify product management experience and the types of catalogues you have worked on

• Screenshot of your internet speed test (Google: “internet speed test”)

• A list of 5 brands you think we currently sell on our UK website, Brand New Bathrooms — this demonstrates you have researched the business before applying

• Results from this English grammar test on the British-Study website: /en/grammar-test

• Include a screenshot of a Shopify product page you have set up (with any sensitive business information redacted if required)

to introduce yourself.

?

?

• Ability to simplify complexity without losing capability



?

?

description:
Job Description



We are an Australian property investment and buyer’s agency business looking for an experienced Property Research VA who has previously worked with an Australian Buyer’s Agent or Property Investment Company.



This is not an entry level role.



If you have not worked in the Australian property industry before, please do not apply.



We are specifically looking for someone who understands how Australian property acquisitions work and can assist with researching investment opportunities, analysing suburbs, and preparing property acquisition reports.



You will be working directly with the principal buyer’s agent to identify high-quality property opportunities and investment strategies.



Accuracy and attention to detail are critical in this role.



Your Responsibilities



You will assist with:



• Suburb and market research across Australian locations

• Identifying subdivision, duplex and granny flat potential

• Analysing zoning and council planning controls

• Reviewing recent comparable sales and rental data

• Preparing property investment research reports

• Assessing development potential and planning restrictions

• Researching off-market and acquisition opportunities

• Supporting the buyer’s agent with property acquisition analysis



This role requires analytical thinking, not just data collection.



Mandatory Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Applicants must meet all of the following criteria:



• Previously worked with an Australian Buyer’s Agent or Property Investment Firm

• Strong understanding of Australian property terminology and processes

• Experience conducting suburb and property investment research

• Ability to prepare structured property research reports

• Familiarity with Australian planning and zoning controls



This role is not suitable for general real estate VAs without Australian experience.



Preferred Tools Experience



Highly regarded if you have experience using Australian property research and planning tools such as:



Property Data Platforms



• CoreLogic / RP Data

• PriceFinder

• 
 and Domain research tools

• SQM Research

• Suburb analytics platforms



Planning & Development Research



• NSW Planning Portal

• Local Council LEP and DCP controls

• DA Tracker systems

• Zoning and minimum lot size analysis

• Section 10.7 Planning Certificates



Mapping & Land Information



• SIX Maps / Spatial Viewer

• Nearmap or aerial mapping tools

• Sewer service diagrams (Sydney Water / Dial Before You Dig)

• Flood and bushfire planning overlays



Market & Rental Analysis



• Comparable sales analysis

• Rental yield analysis

• Vacancy rate research

• Suburb growth trends



Reporting & Research Preparation



• Google Sheets / Excel

• Google Docs

• CRM systems used in Australian real estate



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who is:



• Extremely detail-oriented

• Able to analyse property investment opportunities

• Capable of preparing clear and professional research reports

• Comfortable working independently



This role supports real property acquisitions, so research accuracy is extremely important.



Application Instructions



To apply, please include the following:



The name of the Australian company or buyer’s agent you previously worked for



A sample property or suburb research report you prepared



A short explanation answering this question:



How would you check if a property in NSW allows subdivision or duplex development?



Applications without this information will not be reviewed.



Important



This role is not a training position.



We are specifically looking for someone who has already supported a buyer’s agent in Australia and understands the property research process.

title: Video Editor
description:

 your application to:

title: product researcher
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Product Researcher (Dropshipping)



Job Description:

I am looking for a reliable part-time Product Researcher who will help me find profitable products for my dropshipping stores. The goal of this role is to save time by identifying products with strong sales potential and preparing clear product validation so I can quickly d
 whether the product is worth testing.

The stores operate using the dropshipping model, with products shipped mainly from suppliers in China, so experience with Chinese suppliers or marketplaces is a strong advantage.



Responsibilities:

-Research and identify potential products suitable for dropshipping stores

-Perform product validation before presenting products

-Prepare a clear product validation table/spreadsheet so the information is easy to analyze

-Conduct competitor analysis (pricing, ads, positioning, market demand, etc.)

-Evaluate whether a product has potential for building a brand around it

-Present products in a structured format that allows quick decision-making



Product Validation Should Include (Example):

-Product name and link to supplier

-Estimated product cost

-Suggested selling price

-Estimated margin

-Competitor examples

-Market demand indicators

-Advantages / disadvantages of the product

-Notes and recommendation



Requirements:

-Minimum 3 year of experience in product research for e-commerce or dropshipping 

-Ability to perform solid product validation and competitor research

-Ability to present data clearly in tables or spreadsheets

-Good analytical thinking

-Good written English communication



Nice to Have:

-Experience with dropshipping stores

-Experience working with Chinese suppliers or wholesalers

-Knowledge of platforms such as AliExpress, Alibaba, CJ Dropshipping, etc.



+PINEAPPLE+



Compensation:

-$3–$4 per hour

-Part-time, flexible hours





If you have experience in finding winning products and enjoy market research, feel free to apply.

title: YouTube Tutorial Creator – Cinematic SaaS & Tech Tutorials (4K)
description:
About Us



We run a growing YouTube channel focused on tutorials for AI tools, cloud hosting, and SaaS platforms. We're looking for a dedicated video creator to join us long-term and produce around 16 polished tutorial videos per month.



Reference style: youtu.be/gqO4dWXV3Lk



The Role



You take a short brief (3–4 sentences) and turn it into a complete, cinematic tutorial video – from script to final delivery.



What you'll create:

• A short avatar intro (15–20 sec, lip-synced) explaining what the viewer will learn

• The main tutorial (5–10 min) with screen recordings, zooms, callouts, and clear voiceover

• A short avatar outro (15–20 sec, lip-synced) wrapping things up

• Clean SRT subtitles

• Delivered in 16:9, 4K via Google Drive



Tools you'll cover include platforms like Vultr, Cloudways, vast.ai, Bluehost, Linode, Pinecone, OpenArt, and similar. We provide all accounts and access.



What We're Looking For



You're not just a video editor – you understand how to teach technical topics clearly. You know:

• What to explain and what to skip

• How to keep viewers engaged without overwhelming them

• How to pace a tutorial so it feels polished, not rushed

• When narration is needed and when visuals speak for themselves



Good English voiceover is essential. You should be comfortable recording your own voice.



Compensation

• Paid trial: $40 (guaranteed, paid regardless of outcome)

• Ongoing: $800–$950/month for ~16 videos/month

• Long-term position for the right person



How to Apply



Send us these two things:

1. A link to a tutorial video you created (SaaS, hosting, cloud, AI tools, or similar tech topics)

2. Confirm you can record your own voiceover for the paid trial



That's it. If your work fits, we'll send you the trial brief right away.

title: Video Editor
description:
About 6 Pillars Marketing (6PM)



Celebrating over 30 years of excellence, 6 Pillars Marketing (6PM) is Hawaii’s premier award-winning integrated marketing agency. We blend "Aloha Spirit" with cutting-edge digital technology to build unforgettable experiences across our six core pillars. At 6PM, we don't just create content; we build the visual heartbeat of our clients' brands.



The 6 Pillars of Excellence



Your role as a Video Production Editor will touch every facet of our agency, collaborating with specialists in: Marketing & Advertising | Public Relations | Interactive (Digital) | Experiential Marketing | Immersive Events | Community Relations



Role Overview



We are looking for a versatile Video Production Editor to lead our multi-channel content strategy. On behalf of our agency campaigns and for clients across a wide range of industries, you will transform raw footage into compelling, story-driven, high-performing content for YouTube, Podcasts, Social Media, and Streaming Platforms. The ideal candidate understands the distinct creative DNA required for a 30-minute podcast versus a 15-second TikTok and can execute both with award-winning excellence.



Key Responsibilities



1. Social Media & Micro-Content (High Priority)



- TikTok & Instagram Reels: Create, edit, and optimize high-engagement content. Stay ahead of platform-specific transitions, trending audio, and "scroll-stopping" hooks.

- Vertical Strategy: Expertly manage 9:16 vertical compositions, ensuring all elements are within "safe zones" for UI overlays.

- Content Repurposing: Strategically "atomize" long-form YouTube and Podcast content into high-impact snippets for social growth.



2. YouTube & Long-Form Production



- Narrative Editing: Build engaging story arcs for long-form videos (10–20+ minutes).

- Optimization: Create custom thumbnails, on-screen graphics (lower thirds, CTAs), and manage SEO elements such as chapter timestamps.

- Promotional & Venue Highlights: Produce branded sizzle reels, event recaps, and venue highlight videos that showcase spaces, experiences, and key features for marketing use.



3. Podcast & Audio Post-Production



- Audio Polish: Perform full vocal leveling, noise reduction, and multi-track mixing for professional broadcast quality.

- Video Podcasts: Execute multicam switching for "vodcasts" hosted on Spotify and YouTube.



4. Streaming & OTT Production



- Streaming Shorts: Create promotional content and "shorts" specifically formatted for streaming platforms such as Netflix, Hulu, and Disney+.

- Broadcast Standards: Ensure all streaming assets meet strict technical delivery specifications (color space, loudness, and bitrate).



Technical Stack (Required)



- Adobe Creative Cloud: Mastery of Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Photoshop.

- Mobile-First Tools: Expert-level proficiency in CapCut (Desktop and Mobile) for rapid social turnaround.

- Audio Engineering: Proficiency in Adobe Audition or Descript.

- Delivery Specs: Knowledge of encoding for Netflix/OTT specification exports.

- Collaboration: Experience using 
 and Asana for project management.

- AI & Emerging Tools: Willingness to learn, experiment with, and integrate AI-powered tools to enhance editing workflows, content repurposing, audio cleanup, captioning, and overall production efficiency.



Time requirement



8am - 4pm Philippine Time (1 hour lunch)

Monday - Friday

13th Month Included

US Holiday Schedule



Requirements for consideration -
 



- 5+ years of experience as a Video Editor

- Include an animal that best represents you in the subject line

- Include your portfolio via
: Include examples of both short-form (Reels/TikTok) and long-form (YouTube/Podcast) work.

- Tool Kit: List your top three go-to tools for rapid, high-quality editing.



Compensation: $2,000 USD per month



Cultural Fluency & Local Context (preferred)



- Island Intelligence: A deep-rooted understanding of the distinct identities and nuances of the eight major Hawaiian Islands, especially Oahu, Maui, Kauai, and Hawaii Island.

- Cultural Sensitivity: The ability to represent the "Aloha Spirit" authentically and accurately, ensuring cultural nuances are respected for both local and global audiences.



Overall, we are looking for a person with a positive attitude, professionalism, reliability, great time management skills, open communication, and a passion to learn! If this is you or someone you know, please apply with your resume, portfolio and cover letter

title: Hiring: Mechanical Explainer Video Editor (How Things Really Work Style)
description:
We're building a YouTube channel that explains how machines, vehicles, and industrial systems really work — from jet engines to tower cranes to garbage trucks.



We need an editor who knows how to:



- Research and source stock footage of machines, vehicles, and industrial systems independently

- Cut and combine footage into a clean, flowing narrative

- Add motion graphics: arrows, labels, and technical diagrams directly onto footage

- Create cutaway / X-ray overlay effects that show what's happening inside a machine

- Build smooth, retention-optimized pacing (no dead 
nts)

- Add immersive sound design for machines and mechanical systems

- Make complex systems feel visually simple and satisfying



You will receive:

- A finished script

- A voiceover file

- The topic & visual direction



Everything else — finding the right footage, building the visuals, assembling the video — is your responsibility.



?? Workload: Minimum 1 video per week. Consistent delivery is required.



The goal is simple: The video should NOT feel like raw clips slapped together.



We're aiming for documentary-quality explainer content — clean, professional, and visually satisfying. Think Discovery Channel meets modern YouTube packaging.



???? Budget: $50–70 per video (8–12 min). Long-term collaboration possible.



If you:



? Have experience editing factual / educational / explainer content



? Know how to source stock footage independently



? Can add motion graphics and cutaway diagrams



? Can deliver minimum 1 video per week reliably



? Can show past work in a similar style



D
 with your portfolio.



Serious editors only — quality and attention to mechanical detail matters more than speed.

title: Remote Worker Needed

title: SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
About Us:

We are a growing retail brand with an established physical store and an expanding online presence. As we scale our e-commerce and digital channels, we are focused on building strong organic visibility, improving customer experience, and converting traffic into long-term growth.



We are looking for an SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist to lead our organic search strategy and support broader digital marketing efforts. This role is SEO-first, with digital marketing as a secondary focus.



You will work closely with our developer and content creator to ensure SEO strategies are implemented correctly, content aligns with search intent, and the website performs well both technically and experientially.



About the Role:

The SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist will be responsible for increasing our online visibility, website engagement, and organic-driven sales. This role focuses on strategy, execution, and optimization, ensuring that traffic not only reaches the site but also converts.



Key Responsibilities:

SEO Strategy & Execution (Primary)

Develop and execute SEO strategies for local search, website growth, and e-commerce performance.

Conduct keyword research and map keywords to relevant pages.

Optimize product pages, category pages, and landing pages.

Improve website structure, internal linking, and overall content clarity.



On-Page SEO & Website Engagement:

Improve on-page SEO to increase time on site, clicks, and conversions.

Ensure pages are easy to read, fast, and user-friendly.

Optimize page titles, headings, meta descriptions, images, and layout.



Off-Page SEO & Local Visibility:

Manage and optimize Google Business Profile.

Improve Google Maps and local search visibility.

Support review generation and online reputation management.

Build trust through ethical backlinks, citations, and brand mentions.



Content & SEO Writing Collaboration:

Plan and optimize SEO-driven content (blogs, guides, FAQs).

Update and improve existing content based on performance data.



Work closely with the content creator to ensure content:

Matches search intent.

Supports keyword strategy.

Aligns with brand voice and customer needs.



Digital Marketing & Social Support (Secondary):

Support social media and brand visibility efforts.

Align social content with SEO-optimized landing pages.

Ensure social traffic leads to a strong on-site experience.



Technical SEO Collaboration:

Identify technical SEO issues and translate them into clear action items.



Work closely with the developer to implement improvements related to:

Site speed and performance.

Indexing and crawlability.

Schema markup and SEO best practices.



Tracking & Reporting:

Monitor performance using Google Analytics and Google Search Console.

Track rankings, traffic, engagement, and conversions.

Provide clear reports, insights, and improvement plans.



Requirements:

Proven SEO experience (local SEO + website or e-commerce).

Strong understanding of on-page and off-page SEO.

Experience with SEO and analytics tools.

Ability to collaborate effectively with developers and content creators.

Analytical, detail-oriented, and performance-driven mindset.





What to Include in Your Application?

Please submit one Google Drive link containing the following (do not attach large files):

CV / Resume (PDF).

Examples of Meta 
 & Instagram) campaigns you have managed (Brief description, goals, and results if available).

Examples of Shopify stores or on-page SEO work you’ve done (Links or screenshots are acceptable).

A short explanation of your technical strengths (On-page SEO, content optimization, analytics, tools used, working with developers). 



Important:

Please upload all files to Google Drive and share one accessible link.

This helps keep applications organized and avoids large
 attachments.

Send it to expert works amb 1228 at gmail dot com please remove spaces

title: Graphic Website Designers: $6 to $8 per hour
description:
Senior Graphic Designer: Custom Website Design & AI-Enhanced Creative (Remote / Freelance ? Fulltime Potential)



We’re a growing US-based web design and digital marketing agency looking for experienced senior-level graphic designers who specialize in custom website design and modern digital branding.



This role is for designers who combine high-level creative thinking, strong execution skills, and professional reliability, and who are excited to leverage AI-assisted design tools thoughtfully (not as shortcuts).



If you take pride in polished, strategic design work and thrive in a professional, fast-moving creative environment, we’d love to connect.



???? What You’ll Be Responsible For: 



+ Custom Website Design (Primary Focus)



+ Designing high-end, custom website UI concepts (not template-heavy work)



+ Translating brand strategy into clean, conversion-focused visuals



+ Creating design systems, layout structures, and scalable visual patterns



+ AI-Enhanced Creative Workflow



+ Using AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, DALL·E, etc.) responsibly for ideation



+ Refining AI-generated concepts into fully professional deliverables



+ Maintaining originality, consistency, and brand integrity



+ Marketing & Brand Graphics



+ Creating A+ content, landing page visuals, digital marketing assets, and brand materials



+ Working across web, social, and occasional print production needs



+ Professional Delivery & Collaboration



+ Managing deadlines independently



+ Communicating clearly with design, marketing, and development teams



+ Maintaining consistent design quality across projects



? What We’re Specifically Looking For (Senior-Level Traits)



+ Strategic Design Thinking: You don’t just make things look good; you solve business and UX problems visually.



+ Attention to Detail: Pixel precision, typography mastery, spacing discipline, and consistent design systems.



+ Professional Reliability: Strong communication, deadline ownership, and proactive project management.



+ Creative Maturity: Ability to accept feedback, iterate quickly, and maintain quality under deadlines.



+ AI Design Judgment: Understanding when AI helps, and when true design expertise matters more.



???? Required Skills & Experience (Strict Criteria)



Please apply only if you meet most of these:



+ Proven experience designing custom websites (portfolio required)



+ Strong Figma workflow (components, auto-layout, design systems)



+ Adobe Creative Suite proficiency (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)



+ Strong typography, color theory, layout, and UX awareness



+ Experience designing for marketing conversion (landing pages, A+ content, etc.)



+ Familiarity with AI design tools and prompt workflows



+ Understanding of print production basics (CMYK, bleed, DPI, export prep)



Big Plus:



+ Experience working with web developers or design handoff processes



+ Branding and identity design experience



+ Motion/interactive design awareness



???? Application Requirements (Carefully Reviewed)



To be considered, please include these required materials:



+ Your resume or CV



+ Portfolio of graphic design work



+ At least 5 custom website designs you personally created



Short introduction covering:



+ Your experience level



+ Why you’re a strong fit for this role



+ Your primary design tools and workflow



Also Include:



+ Your availability (hours/week)



+ Your remote workspace setup



?? Applications without real website design samples will not be reviewed.

?? Template-only portfolios or heavily AI-generated work without refinement may be declined.



???? Who Typically Succeeds Here



Designers who:



+ Think like senior creatives, not production-only designers



+ Care deeply about design quality and craft



+ Communicate professionally and reliably



+ Want long-term collaboration rather than one-off gigs



+ Enjoy combining traditional design skill with modern AI tools



If you’re passionate about thoughtful design, continuous growth, and meaningful creative work, we’d love to see your portfolio.



Thank you,



Phong (Peter) Nguyen

title: Meta API Specialist – Two-Way DM to CRM Integration
description:
We are looking for a skilled Meta API Specialist to develop a two-way integration between Meta Direct Messages (DMs) and our custom-built CRM system. The goal is to automatically sync incoming and outgoing messages fro
ta platforms (such as Instagram and
 Messenger) with our internal CRM so that conversations can be managed, tracked, and responded to directly within our system.



This role requires strong experience with the Meta 
) Graph API, messaging webhooks, and building scalable integrations between external APIs and internal platforms.



Key Responsibilities

 • Develop a two-way integration between Meta Direct Messages and our custom CRM.

 • Connect and manage messaging data from Instagram and
 Messenger via the Meta Graph API.

 • Implement webhooks for real-time message synchronization between Meta platforms and the CRM.

 • Ensure bi-directional communication, allowing messages sent from the CRM to appear in Meta DMs and vice versa.

 • Maintain reliable message delivery, error handling, and logging.

 • Work with our internal team to map conversation data structures and CRM workflows.

 • Ensure compliance with Meta platform policies and API requirements.

 • Optimize performance and scalability of the integration.

 • Provide documentation and basic technical handover upon completion.



Required Skills & Experience

 • Strong experience with Meta 
) Graph API.

 • Proven experience integrating Instagra
ssaging API and/or
 Messenger API.

 • Experience implementing webhooks and event-driven architectures.

 • Backend development experience (Node.js, Python, PHP, or similar).

 • Experience integrating external APIs with custom CRM systems.

 • Understanding of authentication methods such as OAuth and access tokens.

 • Ability to debug API issues and handle rate limits, errors, and edge cases.



Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience with customer messaging automation systems.

 • Experience building chat integrations or omnichannel messaging systems.

 • Familiarity with scalable cloud environments (AWS, GCP, or similar).

 • Experience working with CRM data models and conversation pipelines.



Project Scope

 • Integrate Meta messaging APIs with an existing proprietary CRM.

 • Enable real-time synchronization of conversations.

 • Allow agents to read and reply to Meta DMs directly from the CRM.

 • Ensure conversation history and metadata are stored correctly within the CRM.



Hiring Process



To ensure we find the right technical match, the hiring process will include the following steps:

 1. Application Review – Candidates submit their experience, portfolio, or relevant API integration work.

 2. Technical Interview – A video interview to discuss previous API integrations, Meta platform experience, and architecture approach.

 3. Technical Assessment (Optional) – A short architecture discussion or technical task related to the integration.

 4. Final Interview – Review of approach, timelines, and collaboration expectations.

 5. Contract Offer – Selected candidate will receive a formal project agreement.



Only candidates who successfully complete the interview and evaluation process will be considered for the final role.



How to Apply



Please submit the following:

 • A brief introduction and relevant experience

 • Examples of API integrations you have built

 • Any experience specifically with Meta /
 / Instagra
ssaging APIs

 • Your estimated availability and hourly/project rate



We look forward to working with an experienced developer who can help us build a reliable, scalable messaging integration between Meta platforms and our CRM.

title: Experienced Funnel Builder for Ecommerce Wanted, Funnelish Experience Required
description:
Experienced Funnel Builder for Ecommerce Wanted, Funnelish Experience Required



Hey there! ????

We are a fast-growing ecommerce team looking for a motivated and experienced Funnel Builder to join us long-term.



Our business focuses on testing, launching, and scaling new products every day. That is why we are looking for someone who can build and optimize strong, high-converting funnels, so we can bring our products to market as effectively as possible.



Your main responsibilities

As part of our team, you will:



• Build funnels for new product launches based on our SOP, using detailed and easy-to-implement prompts.

• You will receive a competitor’s website from another market. You will recreate this funnel based on our SOP and improve the photos and GIFs compared to the competitor when needed.

• Analyze and improve existing funnels to increase conversion rates.

• Can work quickly without compromising on quality.

• Is creative, proactive, and thinks along with us.

• Is communicative and reliable.

• Is looking for a long-term collaboration.



We are not looking for a one-time freelancer, but for someone who wants to grow with us in the long term.

To make sure you have read the full job post, please include the word:



BETER-LEVEN



Applications without this word will not be considered.



We are excited to meet the right person and build something great together!
