title: Premiere Pro Short-Form Video Editor - Long-term
description:
Please only apply if you can match this editing style with ease: 





Start Here (Pay + Setup)

• We start part-time (20 hours/week)

• Deliver 7 shorts/week (45–60s) in our exact style

• Pay to start: $600/month

• If performance is great (quality + speed + consistency), the idea is to go full-time and there will be an opportunity to take on more responsibility long-term, and receive greater compensation.



---



This is NOT a generic captions job.



We edit in an animated, high quality, modern health style.

Think: bold headlines, metric overlays (Whoop/EightSleep), animations, high retention pacing. 



Before applying, watch our Reference Style you are required to match



Reference Folder (copy/paste into browser):





(Contains 2 of our edited shorts + overlays/assets)



If you cannot match our style exactly, do not apply.

You must be very comfortable replicating this exact style.



---



What you will do

• Edit 7 shorts/week (30–60s) from raw talking-head + b-roll

• Hook-first editing (first 1 second must hit, first 3 seconds must be strong)

• Add clean dynamic captions + word highlighting (not overdone)

• Add metric overlays (Whoop/EightSleep screenshots), headline cards, simple animations

• Use Canva for quick visual assets (rounded edges, frames, text cards) when needed

• Export correctly for IG/TikTok/YouTube Shorts (9:16, safe margins, clean file names)

• Follow SOPs and keep Google Drive organized

• Daily status updates + hit deadlines



Expected delivery: 7 shorts/week, with daily progress updates and fast revisions (same day when needed).



Bonus (nice to have)

• After Effects (simple motion graphics)

• Thumbnail / cover design

• Strong retention instincts



Requirements

• Premiere Pro (required)

• Canva (required)

• Fast workstation + reliable internet

• Great English comprehension & Fluency

• Reliable delivery + fast revisions



---



Trial (simple + flexible)



We’ll start with one quick 1 test edit, then a short paid trial phase to make sure the workflow is smooth.

You should be comfortable delivering consistently and revising quickly when needed.



---



IMPORTANT (Filter)



To apply, start your message with: "sf_edit"

Applications without this will be ignored.



In your application, include:

1. Your best 3 short-form edits (accessible sharing links via Google Drive)

2. 1 edit most similar to our reference style (required) (accessible sharing link via Google Drive)

3. Confirm: Premiere Pro + Canva

4. Your timezone + availability

5. Answer: Can you easily replicate our reference style shared above in the drive folder? (YES/NO)

title: Customer Support Expert
description:
We’re looking for hungry, motivated, and hardworking individuals to join our team as Customer Support Representatives and 
 Moderators. If you can communicate confidently in English and enjoy interacting with people from around the world—especially the U.S.—we want to hear from you.





Who We Are

We’re a 3-year-old customer support company dedicated to giving our clients the best customer experience possible. We help businesses grow by handling their customer interactions, converting leads, and providing reliable, high-quality support.





What We’re Looking For

We want tea
mbers who are excited to learn, grow, and perform at a high level. You’re a great fit if you have:

- A willingness to be trained and coached

- Strong English communication skills (especially in chat)

- A laptop/PC with a reliable internet connection and a backup option

- Fast and stable internet (required for workflow)

- The ability to respond quickly when contacted

- Basic sales or persuasion skills to help convert customers

- Emotional intelligence when dealing with client concerns

- Strong work ethic, reliability, and professionalism





Job Responsibilities

As part of our team, you will:

- Communicate with customers on behalf of our clients to ensure a smooth and positive experience

- Handle inquiries, assist with concerns, and support customers effectively

- Provide sales pitches or conversion strategies to encourage customers to invest in our client’s services

- Clock in/out and begin working as scheduled

- Represent our clients with professionalism and care





Work Schedule (PH Time)

Operations are conducted under the following shifts:

- Shift 1: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM

- Shift 2: 9:00 PM – 7:00 AM







Compensation

- Starting Rate: $1.50 per hour

- Commissions: 3% sales commission (with potential to grow your base rate up to $4/hour depending on performance)





Performance Bonuses: 

Awarded every cut-off based on overall account performance, adherence to company systems, and quality of execution.

Bonuses are structured to reward:

- Strong conversion performance

- Proper upselling and session stacking

- Consistent application of company messaging systems

- Discipline in following friction timing guidelines

- Overall team collaboration and reliability

Bonus eligibility is determined based on measurable performance metrics and manager evaluation.



Low Performance: 8% commission rate only for poor results



We reward hard work, quality performance, and consistent improvement.



How to Apply

Send your application and include “STELLAR SUPPORT” & preferred work schedule in your subject line.

We’re looking for people who want to grow with us—if that’s you, we’d love to meet you!

title: Klarna & PayPal Dispute Expert
description:
We are an e-commerce company focused on providing excellent products to our customers, primarily through platforms like Klarna and PayPal. As our business continues to grow, we are seeking an experienced Klarna & PayPal Dispute Agent to join our team. You will play a key role in managing and resolving payment disputes efficiently to ensure a smooth customer experience.



Responsibilities:



•Review and manage Klarna and PayPal disputes in a timely and professional manner.

Investigate chargebacks and customer claims by analyzing transaction details, policies, and customer history.

Communicate with customers, Klarna, and PayPal to resolve disputes, ensuring compliance with company policies.

Prepare and submit documentation to Klarna and PayPal to defend chargeback cases.

Track the status of ongoing disputes and keep relevant records up to date.

Ensure that customer queries related to payment disputes are resolved to maintain customer satisfaction.

Provide clear and concise reports on dispute resolutions and outcomes.

Suggest improvements in internal dispute handling procedures based on experience.

Skills & Qualifications:



Proven experience in handling Klarna and PayPal disputes, chargebacks, and refunds.

Strong knowledge of e-commerce transaction systems and policies for Klarna, PayPal, and other payment processors.

Excellent communication skills with the ability to handle sensitive situations empathetically.

Ability to analyze transaction data and identify patterns in disputes.

Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills to manage multiple disputes concurrently.

Proficient in using dispute resolution tools and platforms (Shopify, Freshdesk, PayPal, Klarna dispute portals, etc.).

Problem-solving mindset, capable of identifying issues and providing effective resolutions.

Strong knowledge of e-commerce and consumer protection laws.

A background in customer service is highly beneficial.

Preferred Experience:



Experience working in a fast-paced e-commerce environment.

Familiarity with dispute resolution strategies to minimize chargeback rates and protect business revenue.

Multilingual capabilities are a plus (particularly Dutch, English, and German).





What We Offer:



Flexible working hours with the possibility of remote work.

A dynamic and growing company with opportunities for advancement.

A supportive and friendly work environment.





If you are a proactive, detail-oriented individual with expertise in managing Klarna and PayPal disputes, we would love to hear from you! Please send your resume and a cover letter detailing your experience with payment disputes.

description:
Social Media & Blog Content Assistant (AI-Assisted)

?

Social Media Management



You will be responsible for maintaining consistent daily social media activity.

 • Create 4 social media posts per day

, X, etc.)

Most posts can be scheduled in batches, but daily consistency is required.



?



Blog Content Creation



You will produce AI-assisted blog content using ChatGPT.

 • 2 blogs for the Electronics company

 • Content inputs

?



Requirements

?

?

?

Potential increase after 3-month probation based on performance.



ABOUT US



Vilo Engineering Ltd is a UK-based property maintenance and compliance company operating across London. We work with property managers, landlords, developers, and private clients providing electrical compliance, fire safety systems, and maintenance services.



We are now looking to grow our private client base and attract more enquiries directly through our website and online presence.



THE ROLE

REQUIREMENTS

BONUS SKILLS

title: CONVERSION RATE OPTIMIZATION (CRO) SPECIALIST — E-COMMERCE OPERATIONS | APEX VELOCITY
description:

Schedule: Monday to Friday. Flexible hours

Employment: Full-time



We are looking for a Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist to help us improve the performance and conversion rates of Shopify stores for client projects.



What You'll Be Doing

Tasks may vary depending on the project, but typically include:

• Analyzing Shopify store performance and identifying opportunities to improve conversions

• Optimizing product pages, landing pages, and checkout flow

• Running or planning A/B tests to improve user experience and sales

• Reviewing analytics data to understand user behavior and drop-off points

• Using heatmaps and session recordings to identify friction in the customer journey

• Recommending UX and layout improvements to increase conversions

• Collaborating with developers and the operations team to implement optimizations



Requirements

• Experience with conversion rate optimization for e-commerce stores

• Familiar with Shopify store structure and customer journeys

• Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking

• Good communication and reliable with deadlines



Bonus Skills (Not Required)

• Experience optimizing Shopify stores specifically

• Experience with landing page builders like PageFly or GemPages

• 13th month pay and birthday bonus after 6 months with the company.

• 3 vacation leaves + 3 sick leaves after 6 months. We honour most Filipino holidays.

• Paid on time, every time. No chasing invoices.

• Direct access to the founder — your input shapes how the agency runs.

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
ompany: Byraph (R. Badal Holdings LLC)

Type: Full-Time, Remote

Positions: 3

Schedule: 6–7 days/week

Compensation: $1,500–$2,500/month depending on experience



About Byraph

Byraph is a luxury resale company specializing in Chrome Hearts and high-end fashion, based in New York. 8-figure revenue in year two. We’re producing a reality series across Asia and need shortform editors who can turn our daily footage into viral social content. Full-time, not freelance.



The Role

You’ll create the shortform content that drives our social presence — TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts. We shoot hours of footage every day and need editors who can sift through it, find the gold, and turn it into 30–90 second clips that stop the scroll. You need to understand what performs on social, what hooks look like, and how to pace a video for maximum retention in under a minute.

What You’ll Do

 • Review large amounts of raw footage daily and identify the best shortform 
nts

 • Edit 2–4 shortform videos per day (30–90 seconds each, vertical 9:16)

 • Create scroll-stopping hooks in the first 1–2 seconds of every video

 • Add captions — accurate, well-timed, properly styled. Zero typos. This is non-negotiable

 • Select and sync trending or fitting audio/music

 • Layer sound effects for energy without making it corny

 • Create high-impact transitions and cuts

 • Convert horizontal footage to vertical using intentional framing, keyframing, and overlays — not lazy center crops

 • Tag and organize footage (dialogue, B-roll, product shots, funny 
nts)

 • Generate proxies when working with large files

 • Take direction from the longform editors and project manager



Requirements

 • Strong Premiere Pro skills

 • Proven track record editing shortform content that has actually performed (show us the numbers)

 • Excellent captioning skills — fast, accurate, clean formatting

 • Understanding of TikTok/Reels/Shorts trends, pacing, and what makes content go viral

 • Strong audio instincts — music selection, sound effects, dialogue mixing

 • Ability to reformat horizontal footage to vertical creatively

 • Ability to work fast — multiple videos per day, every day

 • Experience with Notion for task management

 • Experience with cloud workflows (L
, 
, or similar)

 • Fluent English

 • Responsive on Slack daily

 • Hardware capable of handling 4K footage and fast exports



Nice to Have

 • After Effects skills for quick motion graphics

 • Experience with luxury/fashion/streetwear content

 • Familiarity with Cinegrams, Epidemic Sound, Envato Elements

 • Experience working as part of a content team (not just solo)



How to Apply

Send the following to 
 with the subject line “SF Editor Application — [Your Name]”:

 • Your portfolio or reel — must include shortform content (TikTok/Reels/Shorts) you’ve edited

 • Links to 3–5 shortform videos you’ve edited with view counts if available

 • Your availability, timezone, and hardware specs



Selected applicants will receive a paid test edit ($100) using real footage from our Asia shoot. You’ll create 3 shortform clips (30–90 sec each, vertical) with captions, sound design, and transitions. 48-hour turnaround.

title: Real Estate Video Editor
description:
JOB TITLE: Real Estate Video Editor

DEPARTMENT: Creative Specialists

REPORTS TO: Manager, Creative Specialists



OVERVIEW:



Are you passionate about crafting compelling real estate stories through video editing? Do you thrive in a dynamic environment that values creativity and innovation? If so, this role might be the perfect fit for you. As a Real Estate Video Editor, you'll be an essential part of our team, contributing to the visual excellence of our real estate marketing solutions.



SUMMARY:



The Real Estate Video Editor is responsible for creating captivating visual content to enhance our real estate listings. This role involves video editing, file management, and ensuring client satisfaction. We are seeking a detail-oriented individual with strong communication skills, creative flair, and a commitment to maintaining the aesthetic standards of our company.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Edit and produce high-quality real estate videos.

- Edit engaging, trendy social media content tailored for platforms like Instagram Reels and TikTok.

- Collaborate with the creative team to ensure a seamless production process.

- Manage and organize video files efficiently.

- Communicate effectively with the team.

- Oversee video projects from start to finish.

- Stay updated on industry trends, video editing techniques, and emerging technologies to enhance the quality and innovation of real estate videos.

- Incorporate client feedback into video edits, making necessary adjustments to meet client expectations and improve overall video quality.

- Adhere to project timelines and deadlines, managing time efficiently to deliver high-quality videos within specified timeframes.

- Stay current with social media trends and apply them creatively to real estate and lifestyle content.

- Use editing techniques that enhance pacing, storytelling, and visual appeal in short-form videos.



REQUIREMENTS:



- Experience working with Final Cut Pro 

- Previous experience in Real Estate or similar industry 

- Previous experience mixing music for videos 

- Strong understanding of current social media trends, audio, transitions, and pacing







WORK HOURS:





This is starting as a part-time position, ranging from 20-30+ hours per week, and will become full time once you are fully trained. Weekend availability may be required. 





Salary Range: 



Training: $5/hr 



Partially trained (Able to fully edit talking head videos to our standard): $7/hr



Fully trained (Able to edit full real estate videos to our standard): $9.50/hr









WORKPLACE CULTURE



As a start-up real estate marketing agency, we foster innovation and disruption. Our workplace values open communication, team chemistry, and embraces stimulating challenges. We LOVE revisions and fulfill them with passion and excitement to help our clients.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS:



- Willingness to go above and beyond to deliver for our clients outside of business hours as needed. 

- 100% remote role

- Prolonged periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE QUALIFICATIONS:



- High school diploma or equivalent.

- Undergraduate degree or equivalent relevant work experience.

- 1-3 years of experience in professional or independent video editing.

- Experience or familiarity with the real estate industry is a plus, as it provides insights into the specific requirements and expectations of real estate video production.









HOW TO APPLY (Only way to be considered):





Please send a short video (recorded on your phone is totally fine) to:

Why do you want to join the Clutch Visuals Media team and what makes you a great fit?

        

What does stellar customer service mean to you?

        

How does this job fit into your life right now? 

       

If you have a resume, please send along with your editing portfolio to Infinite Allah at 
 Visuals Media provides equal employment opportunities and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace, free from discrimination and harassment. We encourage applications from individuals of all backgrounds and experiences.

title: Long Form Lead Editor
description:
Company: Byraph (R. Badal Holdings LLC)

Type: Full-Time, Remote

Positions: 2

Schedule: 6–7 days/week

Compensation: $2,000–$3,500/month depending on experience



About Byraph

Byraph is a luxury resale company specializing in Chrome Hearts and high-end fashion, based in New York. 8-figure revenue in year two. We’re producing a multi-city reality series filmed across Asia and building a dedicated post-production team. This is a full-time role, not a side gig.



The Role

You’ll be one of two lead editors responsible for turning hours of daily raw footage into cinematic, binge-worthy YouTube episodes. Our content is personality-driven, fast-paced, and set in some of the most visually stunning cities in the world. Your job is to make viewers feel like they’re there with us.

What You’ll Do

 • Edit longform YouTube episodes (8–20 minutes) from raw footage shot daily across multiple cameras

 • Build narrative structure — every episode needs a hook, a story arc, and a reason to watch the next one

 • Color grade across multiple cameras and lighting conditions — not just LUTs, real color work (exposure, white balance, color matching)

 • Sound design — dialogue isolation, music selection and balancing, sound effects, and overall audio polish

 • Motion graphics — transitions, text overlays, effects using Premiere and After Effects

 • Integrate B-roll seamlessly to keep the visual energy high

 • Tag and organize large amounts of footage (key dialogue, B-roll, product shots)

 • Generate proxies for massive project files

 • Work with and direct shortform editors when needed

 • Deliver on tight deadlines — we publish frequently and the footage pipeline never stops



Requirements

 • Expert-level Premiere Pro skills — this is your primary tool

 • Strong After Effects skills for motion graphics and visual effects

 • Proven experience editing cinematic/travel/vlog/lifestyle content for YouTube

 • Real color grading ability — show us before/after examples in your reel

 • Strong audio skills — dialogue cleanup, music mixing, sound design

 • Ability to handle and organize massive timelines (hours of footage, terabytes of data)

 • Experience with proxy workflows

 • Ability to work in Notion for task management

 • Experience with cloud workflows (L
, 
, or similar)

 • Strong storytelling instincts — you understand pacing, retention, and how to keep viewers watching

 • Fluent English

 • Responsive on Slack — daily communication with the team is mandatory

 • Capable hardware that can handle 4K editing without choking



Nice to Have

 • Experience with luxury/fashion/streetwear content

 • Blender skills for 3D motion graphics

 • Familiarity with Cinegrams, Epidemic Sound, Envato Elements

 • Understanding of YouTube analytics and retention strategy



How to Apply

Send the following to 
 with the subject line “LF Editor Application — [Your Name]”:

title: Project Manager/ Post-Production Lead
description:
Company: Byraph (R. Badal Holdings LLC)

Type: Full-Time, Remote

Schedule: 7 days/week availability required

Compensation: $3,000–$5,000/month depending on experience



About Byraph

Byraph is a luxury resale company specializing in Chrome Hearts and high-end fashion, based in New York. We’ve hit 8-figure revenue in our second year. We’re currently producing a multi-city reality series filmed across Asia (Tokyo, Osaka, Seoul, Hong Kong, Shanghai, Bangkok, and more) and building a full in-house post-production team to handle daily content output across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and other platforms.

This is not a freelance gig. This is a core leadership role on a fast-moving team producing some of the most exciting content in the luxury fashion space.



The Role

You are the single most important hire we’re making. You will own the entire post-production pipeline — coordinating 2 longform editors, 3 shortform editors, and 1 motion graphics editor. You’ll be the bridge between the creative vision and the final output. Nothing ships without your sign-off.

What You’ll Do

 • Review all incoming raw footage daily and create shot logs, flagging key 
nts, dialogue, B-roll, product shots, and humor

 • Build narrative outlines for every longform episode before handing off to editors

 • Assign tasks across the editing team with clear deadlines and creative direction

 • Review every edit before it goes to final — give specific, actionable feedback on pacing, audio, color, and storytelling

 • Maintain consistent editing style and brand identity across all content

 • Manage the full workflow in Notion — task tracking, deadlines, asset organization, delivery schedules

 • Coordinate cloud editing workflows via L
/Iconik or 

 • Optimize project organization for extremely large Premiere Pro projects (terabytes of daily footage)

 • Be available and responsive on Slack. Every day. This is non-negotiable



Requirements

 • Extensive editing background — you need to have been an editor yourself before you can lead a team of editors

 • Expert-level Premiere Pro and After Effects knowledge

 • Proven experience managing a creative/editing team (not just solo editing)

 • Strong understanding of YouTube retention, pacing, and audience engagement

 • Strong understanding of shortform content strategy (TikTok/Reels/Shorts)

 • Experience with Notion for project management

 • Experience with cloud editing workflows (L
, 
, or similar)

 • Experience with FFmpeg for proxy generation and file management

 • Very strong sense of humor — our content is personality-driven and you need to get the tone

 • Fluent English communication

 • Available 7 days/week (we understand you’re human — but the pipeline doesn’t stop on weekends)



Nice to Have

 • Experience with luxury/fashion/lifestyle content

 • Experience with travel/vlog content

 • Familiarity with Cinegrams, Epidemic Sound, Envato Elements

 • Experience with Iconik media management



Hardware

You must have a capable editing workstation. We deal with terabytes of 4K footage daily. If your computer struggles with large Premiere projects, this role is not for you.



How to Apply

Send the following to 
 with the subject line “PM Application — [Your Name]”:

 • Your portfolio or reel showing work you’ve managed/led (not just edited yourself)

 • A brief description of the largest team and project you’ve managed

 • Links to published content you’ve overseen

 • Your availability and timezone

 • A short paragraph on why you’re the right person for this role



If we like your application, we’ll send you a paid test ($100) using real footage from our Asia shoot. The test evaluates your ability to log footage, build narrative structure, create a team workflow plan, and identify shortform opportunities. 48-hour turnaround.

title: Motion Graphics Editor / Graphic Designer
description:
Company: Byraph (R. Badal Holdings LLC)

Type: Full-Time, Remote

Positions: 1

Schedule: 6–7 days/week

Compensation: $2,000–$3,500/month depending on experience



About Byraph

Byraph is a luxury resale company specializing in Chrome Hearts and high-end fashion, based in New York. 8-figure revenue in year two. We’re producing a multi-city reality series across Asia and need a motion graphics editor to create the visual identity of the series and elevate every piece of content we put out.



The Role

You’re the visual architect. Every intro, lower third, transition template, price overlay, and branded graphic element goes through you. Your work sets the tone for the entire series and ensures every video — longform and shortform — looks and feels like Byraph. This role can also include longform editing if you have the skills, which would be preferred.

What You’ll Do

 • Design and animate the series intro/outro sequence

 • Create animated lower thirds, name cards, location cards used throughout every episode

 • Build transition templates and motion graphics packages the rest of the editing team can use

 • Create graphics-heavy shortform content (product showcases, price breakdowns, “what I found today” style videos with animated elements)

 • Design thumbnails and social graphics as needed

 • Maintain a consistent visual brand identity across all content

 • Collaborate closely with longform and shortform editors to integrate graphics seamlessly

 • If you have strong editing skills, take on longform editing as well



Requirements

 • Expert-level After Effects — this is your primary tool for motion work

 • Strong Premiere Pro skills

 • Strong design eye — typography, color, layout, composition

 • Animation skills — smooth, intentional keyframing, not template-driven cookie cutter stuff

 • Ability to create cohesive brand systems (intro, lower thirds, transitions, overlays that all feel like they belong together)

 • Experience creating graphics for YouTube and social media content

 • Experience with Notion for task management

 • Experience with cloud workflows (L
, 
, or similar)

 • Fluent English

 • Responsive on Slack daily

 • Hardware capable of handling After Effects and Premiere simultaneously with 4K footage



Nice to Have

 • Blender skills for 3D motion graphics and animation

 • Longform video editing ability (strongly preferred — makes you significantly more valuable)

 • Experience with luxury/fashion/streetwear brands

 • Illustration skills

 • Familiarity with Cinegrams, Epidemic Sound, Envato Elements



How to Apply

Send the following to 
 with the subject line “MG Editor Application — [Your Name]”:

 • Your motion graphics reel or portfolio — must show original work, not templates

 • Examples of brand identity systems you’ve created (intros, lower thirds, transition packages)

 • Links to published content featuring your graphics work

 • Your availability, timezone, and hardware specs

 • Whether you also have longform editing ability (and examples if so)



Selected applicants will receive a paid test edit ($100) using real footage and our brand assets. You’ll create a custom intro sequence, 3 animated lower thirds, and 1 graphics-heavy shortform clip. 48-hour turnaround.

title: Ecommerce Team Lead (Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok, Bigseller)
description:
URGENT HIRING



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking an experienced person who can manage a brand's health independently and turn data into growth strategies; managing seller accounts and tea
mbers.



Key Responsibilities:

- Monitor SOPs for campaign execution, product listing (SEO-optimized), and performance reporting to ensure high-quality output.

- Oversee task progress and execute final quality checks on all pre-launch deliverables, including voucher setups, flash sale nominations, and campaign banners.

- Conduct competitor price analysis and market trends to deliver actionable insights.

- Monitoring of orders, GMV (Sales), campaigns, product listings, prices, promotions for accounts.

- Organize and follow up cases by calling or
ing e-commerce platforms (e.g., Refund/Return disputes, customer complaints, and fraud prevention).

- Track and report on Ad Performance (ROAS/ACOS) and key sales metrics, providing the Senior Team Lead with recommendations.

- Conduct daily team check-ins to review pending tasks, proactively address immediate roadblocks, and ensure team alignment on platform priorities (e.g., campaign launches, inventory checks).

- Other ad-hoc tasks and support to the stakeholders.



Qualifications:

- 4–5 years of experience in E-commerce Account Management or Operations, with deep knowledge of Shopee Seller Centre, Lazada Seller Center, and TikTok Shop.

- Proven experience in a supervisory level managing remote teams.

- Advanced skills in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.

title: AI Operations Manager (Remote – Creator Business)
description:
We are hiring a Virtual Operations Assistant/Manager to help run and improve daily operations for a fast-growing subscription-based creator business.



This role focuses on managing workflows, coordinating teams, improving systems, and helping increase overall performance in creator operations and fan engagement.



This is not an entry-level VA role. We need someone who understands fast-paced creator businesses, executes quickly, uses AI tools daily, and can manage operations with minimal supervision.



You will work directly with leadership and help scale internal operations.



Environment



You will be working in a fast-paced creator subscription business involving fan engagement, messaging workflows, and digital monetization operations.



Experience in creator platforms, subscription businesses, or chat-based monetization environments is a strong advantage.



Core Responsibilities

• Manage daily workflows across teams

• Ensure tasks, priorities, and deadlines are met

• Monitor performance and improve efficiency

• Use AI tools to speed up execution and reporting

• Prepare reports, summaries, and performance insights

• Support creator operations and team coordination

• Improve internal systems and processes

• Identify problems and implement scalable solutions



Preferred Experience (Strong Advantage)



Candidates with experience in these environments will be prioritized:



• Creator management agencies

• Subscription-based creator platforms

• Fan engagement or chat-based monetization environments

• High-volume messaging or digital sales operations

• Remote team operations

• Fast-paced online businesses



Experience in creator subscription ecosystems is a major advantage.



Requirements

• Excellent English communication

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Fast execution and strong sense of urgency

• Strong problem-solving skills

• Ability to manage multiple workflows

• Reliable internet and stable remote setup

• Proven remote work experience



AI Requirement (Mandatory)



You must actively use AI tools in your daily work.

Examples:



• ChatGPT

• Claude

• Gemini

• Automation tools

• AI-assisted research and reporting



AI usage is a core part of this role.



Compensation:

$4 – $7 USD per hour (based on experience and performance)

Performance bonuses available.



Work Setup & Schedule:

• Fully remote

• Flexible schedule based on operational needs

• Must be available during assigned working hours

• Long-term position

• Full-time preferred



High performers can grow into Senior Operations and Management roles. We prioritize long-term tea
mbers.

Ideal Candidate



Someone who:

• Takes ownership

• Executes quickly

• Understands creator-based businesses

• Is comfortable in performance-driven environments

• Uses AI naturally to increase productivity

• Focuses on solutions



How to apply:



Message us and we will send you a form to apply.

title: Trading Chart Research & Sync Editor (Content VA) – Remote
description:
Hello — hope you’re doing well!

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



This is a long-term collaborative opportunity for editors who value consistency, creativity, and growth alongside a dedicated team.

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



We run a high-quality trading education channel and are looking for a resourceful, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who can listen to a narrated voiceover, understand the trading concepts being explained, and find (or recreate) charts that perfectly match each segment.



This position blends chart literacy with creative problem-solving — you’ll often need to recognize what’s being discussed even when the term isn’t explicitly stated, and then source or recreate the right chart to visually communicate the concept to viewers.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Responsibilities

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Listen closely to the provided clip and tell the story through accurate, well-timed chart visuals.



Understand the trading term, setup, or market condition being discussed.



Locate, screenshot, or recreate high-quality trading charts that match the narration.



Add relevant effects, transitions, and annotations using Camtasia to enhance storytelling and maintain viewer engagement.



Verify each chart shows the correct instrument, timeframe, and clarity.



Organize and deliver charts in sequence for the video editor to sync.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Requirements

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Strong understanding of core trading concepts (support/resistance, indicators, market structure, patterns, liquidity grabs, etc.).



Ability to deduce and identify setups even when implied in narration.



Hands-on experience with Trading View or similar charting platforms.



Resourceful and precise — able to find the best visual representation, not just the easiest one.



Exceptional attention to detail, timing, and visual storytelling.





________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Platform Requirement

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Camtasia is required for the entire project.



You will be provided with all effects, transitions, and other tools needed to complete the work through our Camtasia Library package.



All work must be created, edited, and exported through Camtasia, ensuring all effects, transitions, and assets are properly embedded in the Camtasia Library Package (.libzip) format.



You may use the free version — a paid license is not required.



Ensure your system can run Camtasia smoothly and handle exporting without lag or crashes.





________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Training & Brand Style

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Full training provided on our chart color codes, formatting, and visual standards.



Access to visual templates to ensure consistency across all videos.



The goal: maintain a clean, professional, and uniform chart style that aligns with our brand identity.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Nice to Have

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Previous experience in trading or finance-related content creation.



Familiarity with educational or YouTube-based video production workflows.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Workload & Pay

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



1 video per month (8–12 minutes each)



(Includes a 1-minute clip workflow to maintain consistency and quality across projects.)



Pay Range: $70 – $150+ per video



Based on:



- Skill level



- Creativity



- Accuracy



- Execution quality



- Turnaround time



- Effort level



The link below showcases the work produced by editors on the team. All of the edits are strong, but each one reflects a different level of dedication, detail, and overall quality — and that’s exactly why we use an incentive-based system. 



The harder you work, and the more accurately and creatively you execute the story using chart visuals and our effects library, the more you earn.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Flexible schedule — because we view editors as partners, you’re trusted to manage your own time, work efficiently, and find the pace that suits you best while still delivering within a reasonable timeframe.



________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



How to Apply

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Include the word “RSI” at the top of your application to confirm you’ve read this description.

In your message, please share:



Your experience with trading and charting platforms.



Any examples or samples of your past trading visuals or chart work.



If you have any questions at all , don’t hesitate to ask — we value clear communication and collaboration. 



Thank you for your time.

title: Client Follow-Up Specialist (Remote / Part-Time)
description:
About the Role

We run a fast-growing online trading education and prop firm access business. Our clients go through a sales process and often need a few nudges before they commit — and that's where you come in.

We're looking for someone reliable and communicative to handle personalized follow-ups with leads and existing clients on our accounts. This is not copy-paste spam. Each follow-up needs to feel personal, warm, and well-timed.

We operate across time zones and need two people to cover the full day. You're applying for one of the two shifts below.



The Two Shifts

???? Shift A — Day Shift 6:00 AM · 10:00 AM · 2:00 PM (UK Time)

???? Shift B — Night Shift 4:00 PM · 8:00 PM · 12:00 AM (UK Time)

Please only apply for the shift you can commit to consistently, every day. Reliability matters more than anything else in this role.



What You'll Be Doing

Sending 3 rounds of personalized follow-ups per day at your scheduled times

Replying to prospects and clients on our messaging platforms

Keeping the tone natural, friendly, and on-brand

Tracking who has been contacted and flagging hot leads

Following the scripts and templates we provide (with room to personalize)



Time Commitment

60–90 minutes per day split across your 3 check-ins. Part-time but requires daily consistency — no skipping without notice.



You're a Great Fit If You:

Have excellent written English (natural, not robotic)

Are highly organized and never drop the ball on follow-ups

Are proactive — you don't need to be micromanaged

Have experience in customer communication, sales support, or VA work

Can genuinely commit to your shift times every single day



Send us a short message on 
 introducing yourself, telling us which shift you're applying for, and explaining why you'd be the right fit for this role.

title: Email Marketing Strategist (Klaviyo Expert) — E-commerce Skincare Brand
description:
We are a premium European skincare brand (adelira®) selling in the Netherlands and Belgium. We help women 50+ see real, visible results in their skin. Our product actually works — the challenge is turning subscribers into buyers, and buyers into loyal repeat customers through strategic
 marketing.



We're looking for an
 Marketing Strategist who owns the entire
 channel in Klaviyo — strategy, design, and execution. All in one pair of hands.



?



THE ROLE



You'll build and improve automated flows, plan weekly campaigns, design the
s yourself in Klaviyo, run structured A/B tests, and turn our
 list into a predictable revenue engine.



This is a full-ownership role. You think strategically about what to send, to whom, when, and why — then you design and build it yourself. No handoffs, no waiting for a designer. You control the entire process from concept to send.



We provide brand guidelines, product photography, and creative assets. You turn them into
s that drive revenue.



?



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Automated Flows (Klaviyo):

- Build and optimize the full flow ecosystem: welcome series, abandoned cart, browse abandonment, post-purchase nurture, replenishment reminders, win-back, sunset, VIP, and birthday flows

- Set up conditional splits and branching logic based on customer behavior, purchase history, and engagement

- Configure dynamic content blocks and personalized product recommendations

- Monitor flow performance weekly and continuously improve conversion rates



Campaigns:

- Plan and execute 2-3
 campaigns per week (promotional, educational, social proof)

- Maintain a content calendar aligned with product launches, seasonal 
nts, and promotions

- Write
 copy — subject lines, preview text, body copy, and CTAs

- Manage segmentation for each send — the right message to the right people

- Balance promotional vs. value-driven content to maintain engagement and trust



 Design:

- Design clean, on-brand
 templates directly in Klaviyo's editor

- Create header graphics, product showcases, and promotional visuals

- Build modular, reusable template blocks for different
 types

- Ensure all designs are mobile-responsive and optimized for readability (our audience is 50+)

- Maintain visual consistency with our brand guidelines across every

- Use Canva or similar tools when custom graphics are needed



Testing & Optimization:

- Run structured A/B tests on subject lines, send times, content, CTAs, layouts, and flow timing

- Ensure statistical significance before drawing conclusions

- Track and report on key metrics: revenue per recipient, placed order rate, click rate, list growth, churn

- Monitor deliverability: sender reputation, spam complaints, bounce rates, authentication (SPF/DKIM/DMARC)

- Maintain list hygiene: clean inactive subscribers, manage suppression lists, segment by engagement



List Growth & Signup Forms:

- Design and optimize signup forms, popups, and landing pages in Klaviyo

- Test different offers, triggers, and placements to maximize opt-in rates

- Ensure GDPR compliance for all EU data collection



?



HARD REQUIREMENTS — Please only apply if you meet ALL of these:



? 2+ years hands-on experience with Klaviyo (not just "familiar with" — you've built flows, designed
s, and run campaigns)

? Proven track record of growing
 revenue for an e-commerce or DTC brand

? Deep understanding of flow architecture: welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back, replenishment, sunset

? Strong
 design skills — you can create professional, on-brand
s in Klaviyo without needing a separate designer

? Experience running structured A/B tests with proper methodology

? Strong segmentation skills: RFM analysis, engagement tiers, behavioral segments

? Understanding of deliverability: list hygiene, sender reputation, authentication

? Good copywriting skills — subject lines, body copy, and CTAs that convert

? Comfortable with data and analytics

? Can work independently without constant direction



BONUS:

- Experience with beauty, skincare, or wellness brands

- Experience marketing to 40+ or 50+ audiences

- Canva Pro, Figma, or Photoshop skills for custom
 graphics

- Basic HTML/CSS knowledge for
 customization

- Klaviyo SMS experience

- Shopify experience

- GDPR compliance knowledge



?



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



? You've only used Mailchimp or basic ESPs and want to "learn Klaviyo on the job"

? You think
 marketing is just writing newsletters

? You're a strategist who needs a separate designer to make
s look good

? You can't design a clean, professional
 layout on your own

? You've never set up a proper A/B test with a clear hypothesis

? You rely on "best practices" instead of testing what actually works for a specific audience

? You're not comfortable with data, analytics, and reporting



?



HOW YOU'LL WORK



- Strategy & planning: You work directly with the founders on targets and priorities

- Design & build: You design and build every
 yourself in Klaviyo — strategy, copy, design, and execution in one pair of hands

- Assets: We provide brand guidelines, product photography, and creative assets. You turn them into
s that sell.



?



WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU



? Work directly with the founders — no bureaucracy

? Full ownership of the entire
 channel — strategy, design, and execution

? See direct impact:
 revenue is tracked and attributed

? We invest in you long-term with real training and mentorship

? Access to all tools you need — Klaviyo, Canva Pro, AI tools (we pay for subscriptions)

? Flexible hours — we care about output, not when you're online

? Growth path to Head of
 / Head of Retention



?



HOW TO APPLY



Please apply through our application form: 

h t t p s : / / j o b s . a d e l i r a . n l / k l a v i y o - s t r a t e g i s t (REMOVE SPACES)



In the form we'll ask you:

1. Your Klaviyo experience — which flows you've built and what results you achieved

2. Examples of
s you've personally designed and built

3. Practical scenario questions — how you think about real
 marketing challenges

4. Optionally: a short Loom video introduction (strongly recommended)



?? We work with AI tools every day — we know exactly what an AI-written application looks like. If your application is clearly generated by ChatGPT or Claude, we will not consider it.

title: Instagram & Meta Ads Expert | WooCommerce Conversion Specialist
description:
We are a European brand with high-quality products. 

Last year we started in july and did €32k, and our goal is to hit €400k in revenue this year. 

We have the products and the quality; now we need the marketing engine to make it happen.



I am NOT looking for a "Virtual Assistant" who just follows tasks. 

I am looking for a Meta Ads Expert who takes ownership of the ROAS and our growth on Instagram.



Your Core Mission:



Meta Ads Management: Full setup, testing, and scaling of Instagram &
 ad campaigns.



WooCommerce Optimization: You audit our store and landing pages to ensure the traffic we buy actually converts. You understand how to optimize WooCommerce for speed and sales.



Data-Driven Scaling: You analyze the numbers daily. 

You kill the losers and double down on the winners.



Performance Reporting: Weekly updates on spend, ROAS, and CPA. You talk in profit, not just clicks.



Requirements:



Proven experience scaling D2C brands on Meta/Instagram.



Expert knowledge of Meta Ads Manager (CBO, ABO, Creative testing).



Deep experience with WooCommerce. 

You know how to track conversions and optimize a WordPress-based shop.



You are proactive. You don't wait for me to tell you what to do; you tell me what we need to do to grow.



Offer:



Salary: $400 - $550 USD per month for 20 hours/week (based on your proven track record).



Growth: This role starts at 20h but can quickly grow to full-time as we hit our milestones.



Start your message with the words "GAS GEVEN" so I know you read this.



Share a screenshot or case study of a WooCommerce brand you helped scale.



Tell me: What is the first thing you would check in our Meta Ads Manager if our sales are stalling?

title: Marketing Coordinator
description:
Location: Remote

Rate: $3–6/hour (DOE)

Timezone Requirement: Must be available during CST business hours

Type: Part-Time (10–25 hrs/week) with opportunity to move to Full-Time

Reports To: Marketing Manager



Are you a detail-driven marketing operator who thrives on structure, systems, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks? Token of Trust is looking for a Marketing Coordinator to help power the day-to-day execution of our Growth team and keep our marketing engine running smoothly.



HELLO!



Hey, I’m Austin, and I lead Growth at Token of Trust. We’re not a startup — we’ve been around for over a decade, building trust and identity solutions for ecommerce businesses, and many of our remote tea
mbers have grown with us over the years. We’re looking for a Marketing Coordinator to support the day-to-day operations of our Growth team. This role is perfect for someone who thrives on structure, organization, and execution. You’ll keep content calendars full, tasks tracked, and cross-functional projects moving — strategy is set, your job is to make it deliverable.



Our team operates on a hybrid Customer-Led Growth (CLG) and Product-Led Growth (PLG) model, which demands tight coordination, clean systems, and disciplined execution. If you love organized boards, smooth workflows, and seeing projects go from “idea” to “published” without chaos — you’ll fit right in.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



CONTENT CALENDAR MANAGEMENT

- Own and maintain our marketing content calendar across blog and social (LinkedIn,
)

- Ensure content is always scheduled at least 1–2 weeks in advance to avoid gaps

- Coordinate timelines with writers, designers, and the Head of Marketing to keep deliverables on track

- QA and upload blog content into CMS (WordPress), format for readability, and ensure all links/UTMs/CTAs are correct

- Schedule and publish social posts via Meta Business Suite or similar tools

- Design blog graphics, social media visuals, and lightweight reels or video snippets for posts



Task & Project Coordination

- Create and manage Trello cards for all marketing tasks — no important item should go undocumented

- Ensure every task card includes: Acceptance Criteria, Release Notes, and Risk Checklist (if applicable) before it moves to “In Progress”

- Track weekly priorities, manage the sprint board, and surface blockers when needed

- Maintain visibility into both committed work and in-progress items to help the tea
et deadlines



Cross-Functional Support

- Intake requests from other departments via the Growth team’s Trello inbox and ensure timely follow-up

- Support cross-functional execution —
 sends, campaign QA, partner collateral updates, etc.

- Assist with formatting and publishing marketing materials, blog posts, and newsletters



Ops & Reporting

- Support weekly reporting on marketing metrics, completed activities, and process improvements

- Help enforce consistency around folder organization, UTMs, naming conventions, and metadata tracking



What You Bring:

- 1–3 years of experience in marketing coordination, project management,  editorial operations, or content marketing

- Highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented — you love clarity, checklists, and closing the loop

- Comfortable managing and enforcing process in Trello (or similar task management tools)

- Confident using WordPress, social schedulers (e.g., Buffer, Later, Meta Suite), and Google Workspace

- Intermediate SEO knowledge — including keyword research, on-page optimization, internal linking, metadata, and basic content performance analysis

- Clear written communication and professional follow-through

- Design experience using Canva, Figma, or similar tools to create marketing visuals and short-form content

- Familiarity with B2B SaaS marketing and content performance reporting is a plus



WHY YOU SHOULD APPLY

- Flexible schedule with required attendance at key meetings in Central Time and at least 2 hours of CST overlap daily

- Opportunity to grow into full-time with incentives and bonuses

- Access to professional marketing tools

- Long-term stability

- Real ownership of operational marketing execution



HOW TO APPLY

We’re looking for more than just a resume show us your skills! Drop us a message or send your resume highlighting your relevant background.



To apply:

1) Put the word “trust” in your subject line.

Applications without this word in the subject line will not be reviewed. 



2) In the first line of your message, list the 3 most important requirements you noticed in this job post.



3) Then answer the questions below in your application message:

Why are you a strong fit for this role?

In 150–200 words, explain why you are a good fit for this position. Reference 2 specific responsibilities from this job post and tell us which tools or workflows you’ve used that are most similar.



Content Project Example

Describe one specific blog post or content project you personally coordinated from start to publish. Please include:

- Company or brand name

- CMS used

- Who else was involved

- 3 specific steps you handled yourself

- Any SEO steps you implemented

- 1 issue, delay, or problem you had to solve

- Measurable outcomes

- A live link to the published piece



Social Post Example

Provide one real example of a social post you personally scheduled. Please include:

- Platform

- Exact caption

- Goal of the post

- Why you chose that timing

- Results achieved

- A live link or screenshot of the post



If your experience seems like a strong match, we’ll be in touch to discuss next steps.



If you’re passionate about technology, enjoy tackling new challenges, and want to make a real impact, we’d love to hear from you. Let’s build something incredible together!

title: Quality Assurance Specialist (Home Health)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and experienced Clinical Documentation & Quality Assurance (QA) Specialist to support our Home Health Agency. The ideal candidate must have a strong knowledge of clinical documentation, home health regulations, and quality standards (OASIS, CMS, CoPs). This role ensures accuracy, compliance, and completeness of all patient records and supports the agency in delivering high-quality care.



Key Responsibilities

1. Clinical Documentation Review

Review all clinical notes (SN, PT, OT, ST, MSW, HHA) for accuracy, completeness, and compliance.

Ensure documentation reflects medical necessity, skilled services, and the Plan of Care (POC).

Audit OASIS assessments for accuracy and congruency with patient condition and visit notes.

Ensure timely submission of documentation per agency standards.



2. Chart Audits & Compliance

Conduct routine chart audits for SOC, Recertification, ROC, Transfers, and Discharges.

Ensure all required documents are present (physician orders, consents, supplemental orders, POCs).

Monitor visit frequency, discipline coordination, and regulatory timelines.

Identify deficiencies and provide corrective action guidance.



3. Quality Improvement Activities

Participate in the agency’s QAPI program.

Track and analyze QA metrics (infections, hospitalizations, falls, adverse events, missed visits).

Assist in identifying trends and implementing improvement plans.



4. Staff Education & Support

Support clinicians with documentation, POC, orders, and compliance-related questions.



5. Coordination & Communication

Collaborate with the care team and administrative staff to ensure alignment with QA standards.

Communicate QA findings professionally with recommendations for correction.

Follow up to ensure timely completion of revisions and updates.



6. Other Duties

Assist with preparation for state surveys and accreditation visits.

Review and update QA-related policies and procedures.

Participate in case conferences as needed.



Monthly Rate: P18,000 starting



Equipment:

• Laptop or desktop computer

• Stable internet connection

• Webcam

• Headset/earphones



If you are passionate about accurate documentation, quality care, and supporting a high-performing healthcare team, we encourage you to apply.



Kindly submit your resume with the subject title “QA SPECIALIST”.

Send your application to:

title: Outbound Appointment Setter / Sales Development Representative (Part-Time)
description:
Location: Remote

Schedule: Part-time, but will transition into full-time after 2 weeks or 1 month



Compensation:

$5/hour base pay

$5 bonus per attended appointment

$15 bonus per closed deal



About the Role



We are looking for a high-energy, results-driven Outbound Appointment Setter / SDR to help us connect with qualified leads, book calls, and support business growth through proactive outbound efforts.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys being on the phone, knows how to build trust quickly, and thrives in a performance-based environment. You should be comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls, handling objections, and converting conversations into booked appointments.



We are not just looking for someone who can “dial.” We want someone with a hunter mentality someone who enjoys the challenge of outbound sales and knows how to turn conversations into opportunities.



What You’ll Do



Make high-volume outbound calls to warm and cold leads



Book qualified appointments for the sales team



Follow scripts, frameworks, and training provided during onboarding



Handle objections confidently and keep conversations moving toward a booked call



Update lead statuses and manage pipelines inside our CRM

Potentially assist with inbox management and light outreach tasks as training progresses



What We’re Looking For



Must-have qualities:



Strong outbound calling or appointment setting experience



Excellent English communication skills



Confident, persuasive, and emotionally intelligent on the phone



Able to build rapport quickly and lower resistance in conversations



Comfortable with performance-based compensation



Coachable and open to feedback, role plays, and ongoing training



Self-motivated and consistent with daily activity targets



Ideal background:



Experience making 150–200 calls per day



Experience in cold calling, appointment setting, telesales, or SDR roles



Familiarity with CRM tools and pipeline management



Experience in service-based businesses, B2B, coaching, healthcare, or similar industries is a plus



Willingness to learn social media outreach and inbox engagement over time



What Success Looks Like



In this role, success is measured by outcomes, not just activity. You will be expected to:



Maintain strong daily call volume



Consistently book appointments



Help improve show-up rates



Contribute to closed deals through quality conversations and follow-up



We are looking for someone who can quickly become productive and help us increase qualified conversations each week.



How to Apply:

title: Project Manager (Leadership Team) – URGENT HIRING
description:
Take the next step in your professional journey!

Apply today through our official careers page: 



Company: Ascension Business Solutions LLC

Department: Operations / Leadership

Reports To: CEO / General Manager

Employment Type: Full-Time

Work Setup: Remote

Schedule: U.S. Business Hours (Graveyard Shift – PH Time)

Compensation: Competitive compensation package, commensurate with experience and leadership role alignment



ABOUT THE ROLE

Ascension Business Solutions LLC is seeking a high-accountability Internal Project Manager to lead and execute cross-functional strategic initiatives across Sales, Recruitment, Training & Development, Operations, CRM, and Client Success.



This is not an assistant role. This is an ownership role.



The Internal Project Manager serves as the operational integrator — ensuring leadership vision turns into structured execution. This role is responsible for driving initiatives from ideation to implementation with defined scope, KPIs, role accountability, timelines, and measurable outcomes.



ABS operates as a people operating system. Strategy without execution creates instability. This role ensures that initiatives are delivered with clarity, discipline, and measurable impact.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Project Leadership & Execution

Translate leadership strategy into structured project plans

Define scope, deliverables, timelines, and measurable success metrics

Build implementation roadmaps with clear accountability

Assign responsibilities and enforce deadlines

Identify risks early and escalate blockers proactively

Ensure projects are delivered on time and within scope



2. Cross-Department Coordination

Lead structured project meetings with clear agendas and outcomes

Align Sales ? Recruitment ? Training ? Operations ? Client Success handoffs

Ensure KPIs are aligned across departments

Eliminate silos and reduce execution delays

Establish clear ownership for every deliverable



3. Process & Systems Implementation

Build and standardize SOP frameworks for new services

Implement structured workflows within CRM, HRIS, and reporting systems

Ensure documentation is centralized, clean, and accessible

Audit process adherence and close operational gaps



4. Performance Tracking & Reporting

Define measurable KPIs per initiative

Track weekly progress and provide leadership dashboards

Distinguish leading vs lagging indicators

Recommend course corrections proactively

Improve operational metrics such as retention, onboarding cycle time, readiness rate, and handoff quality



5. New Service Launch Management

When ABS launches a new service line, this role will:

Define required roles and team structure

Coordinate with Recruitment on hiring criteria

Align Training on readiness standards

Align Sales messaging with operational capacity

Ensure full go-live readiness before client-facing rollout



QUALIFICATIONS:

Required Experience:

3–7 years of Project Management experience

Experience leading cross-functional teams

Experience building systems or processes from scratch

Strong understanding of KPI tracking and operational metrics

Experience in service-based organizations



Preferred Experience:

Healthcare or home care industry experience

Experience in scaling or growth-stage organizations



SKILLS & COMPETENCIES

Execution & Ownership

Strong bias toward action

Comfortable enforcing deadlines

High accountability standards

Creates clarity where ambiguity exists



Strategic Thinking

Breaks big vision into tactical execution steps

Understands operational cause-and-effect

Identifies bottlenecks quickly



Communication

Direct but professional

Comfortable managing up, across, and down

Can facilitate structured meetings



Systems-Oriented

Comfortable with CRM systems (GoHighLevel preferred)

Familiar with HRIS systems (BambooHR a plus)

Experience with project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, Monday, etc.)

Strong documentation discipline



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS:

Ascension Business Solutions offers a structured, long-term employment opportunity designed to support stability, growth, and professional development.

We are seeking a remote partner or VA from the Philippines for a full-time, independent contractor position, Monday through Friday, 8 am to 5 pm GMT-5. Compensation is based on experience and production level.



Position Overview

The Transaction Coordinator manages ?les from binding agreement to closing. Previous experience as a TC is required (bonus points if you are familiar with Georgia real estate transactions), proactive communication, and the ability to manage multiple transactions with precision and urgency. You will serve as a point of contact for agents, clients, lenders, attorneys, and cooperating agents throughout the transaction.

title: Video Editor
description:
We’re a fast-growing arts & crafts brand looking for a detail-obsessed Video Editor who can turn raw footage into scroll-stopping videos and clear, easy-to-follow clay tutorials. If you love internet culture and making videos people want to watch and share, you’ll fit right in.



You’ll also assist with basic graphic design for ads.



## What you’ll do



- Edit high-performing short-form videos for Instagram +
 (Reels-first).

- Edit long-form clay tutorials with clear step flow, pacing, and clean instructional overlays.

- Assist with graphic design of simple ads on Canva

- Iterate fast with feedback without sacrificing quality.

- Add accurate, error-free captions and on-screen text.

- Deliver content on tight deadlines, with a focus on daily output.



## You’re a fit if you…



- Can edit fast-paced, retention-focused short-form (strong hooks, pattern interrupts, satisfying pacing).

- Are an expert in CapCut + Adobe Premiere (IMPORTANT)

- You know how to use Canva, and Adobe Photoshop.

- Have strong instincts for sound design (whooshes, taps, “satisfying” micro-audio, music mixing).

- Enjoy arts & crafts / have basic crafting familiarity (you can spot when a step is confusing or missing).

- Are organized and can handle multiple projects with shifting priorities in a remote startup environment.

- Communicate clearly and ask questions early when something is unclear.



### Availability / Timezone



- Full time, 40 hours a week.

- Able to work 3 hours overlap with Toronto time (ET) from 10:00am–1:00pm ET. Work hours outside of the 3 hours specified are flexible.



Compensation: $640USD/month



*Note that to apply, there is a mini assignment that should take less than 30 minutes to complete within the application.*
