title: Accountant (UK-based Client)
description:
Job Overview

HARON Ltd is looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Accountant to support a UK-based client on a long-term, full-time basis. This role focuses on day-to-day UK bookkeeping, VAT preparation, and management reporting, ensuring accurate and compliant financial records.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with UK accounting processes, is confident working independently in a remote setup, and can provide clear, timely financial information to support management decision-making.



Key Responsibilities

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date bookkeeping records using Xero

- Perform bank, credit card, and balance sheet reconciliations

- Prepare monthly management accounts (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)

- Prepare and submit quarterly UK VAT returns

- Monitor accounts payable and receivable, including invoicing and payment tracking

- Track expenses, budgets, and cash flow to support financial planning

- Assist with year-end preparation and coordination with external accountants

- Support HMRC compliance by ensuring records are complete and audit-ready

- Improve and maintain internal accounting processes and controls



Qualifications & Requirements

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field

- Minimum 2 years of hands-on UK accounting experience (required)

- Strong working knowledge of: 

      - UK bookkeeping practices

      - VAT preparation and submissions

      - Financial statement preparation

- Proficiency in Xero (required)

- Experience using TaxCalc or similar UK tax software is an advantage

- High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

- Excellent written and spoken English communication skills

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a remote environment

- Provide clear financial summaries and insights to management when required



Nice to Have (but not required)

- Experience supporting UK-based SMEs

- Exposure to payroll coordination (not primary responsibility)

- Familiarity with Google Sheets and cloud-based workflows



Why Join Us

- Long-term, stable role with a UK-based client

- Fully remote setup

- Opportunity to work closely with management and influence financial processes

- Supportive, people-first working culture



How to Apply

- Please send your updated CV to 

-
 subject: Application for Accountant 2026 – [Your Name] 

- Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: IT Security Analyst
description:
About Cyber Security Resource



Cyber Security Resource is a cybersecurity consulting firm focused on helping healthcare organizations, SaaS companies, and technology providers strengthen their security posture through practical, cost-effective security services. Our work includes vulnerability management, cloud security posture management, risk assessments, compliance alignment (HIPAA, HITRUST), and security program development.



We partner closely with client organizations to provide hands-on security expertise that supports both technical teams and executive leadership.



Position Overview



Cyber Security Resource is seeking an IT Security Analyst to support one of our consulting clients in managing and improving their vulnerability management and cloud security posture management (CSPM) programs.



This role will work closely with engineering, DevOps, and cloud infrastructure teams to monitor security posture, track vulnerabilities, support remediation efforts, and help ensure security best practices are implemented across cloud environments.



The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, technically curious, and comfortable working in a consulting environment where security initiatives evolve with client needs.



Key Responsibilities

Vulnerability Management



Monitor and review vulnerability scan results across infrastructure, applications, and cloud resources



Track vulnerabilities through remediation lifecycle using ticketing systems (e.g., Jira)



Prioritize vulnerabilities based on risk severity and business impact



Coordinate with DevOps and engineering teams to validate remediation efforts



Maintain vulnerability tracking metrics and reporting



Support development of vulnerability management policies and processes



Cloud Security Posture Management



Monitor cloud security posture across AWS environments



Identify cloud misconfigurations and security risks



Track remediation activities related to cloud security findings



Assist with implementation of cloud security best practices



Review IAM policies, network configurations, and logging controls for security alignment



Support monitoring tools used for cloud security posture management



Security Operations Support



Document security findings and remediation progress



Assist with maintaining security documentation and operational procedures



Support security initiatives related to compliance and risk management



Participate in regular security status meetings with internal teams and consulting clients



Contribute to ongoing improvement of security monitoring and governance practices



Required Qualifications



2–5 years of experience in IT security, security operations, or cloud security



Experience working with vulnerability scanning tools (e.g., Tenable, Qualys, Rapid7, etc.)



Familiarity with AWS cloud environments



Basic understanding of cloud security best practices



Experience tracking security issues using ticketing platforms such as Jira



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



Ability to communicate technical issues clearly to engineering teams



Strong attention to detail and documentation



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) tools



Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code environments (Terraform or CloudFormation)



Knowledge of security frameworks such as NIST, CIS, HIPAA, or HITRUST



Experience working in healthcare, SaaS, or regulated environments



Security certifications such as Security+, AWS Security Specialty, or similar



What You'll Gain



Experience working in regulated healthcare and SaaS environments



Exposure to enterprise cloud security practices



Opportunity to work alongside experienced cybersecurity consultants



Real-world involvement in improving security posture for growing organizations

title: Revit Architect — Construction Documents | US Architecture Firm | Full-Time 9–5 PST
description:
We are a US-based architecture firm (residential and commercial) looking for experienced Revit architects to join our production team. You will be producing construction documents, Revit modeling, and detailing for real projects in California.

We are hiring multiple positions. This is not a one-time project — this is a permanent, full-time role on a growing team.



What You'll Do

- Produce full construction document sets in Revit (floor plans, elevations, sections, details, schedules)

- Build and maintain Revit models to our office standards

- Prepare drawing sets for city plan check submittal

- Address plan check corrections and resubmittals

- Coordinate with structural, MEP, and civil engineers

- Sheet setup, title blocks, annotations, and dimensioning to US standards

- Support other tea
mbers on complex projects as directed by the Production Manager



Who You Are

- 3+ years of experience producing construction documents in Revit

- You have worked on US projects — you understand US building codes, title block standards, and plan check requirements

- Strong in Revit families, modeling, and sheet production

- You know what a US construction document set looks like — not just 3D modeling, but full permit-ready CDs

- Detail-oriented — your drawings are clean, consistent, and accurate

- Comfortable working as part of a team with daily check-ins

- Can take direction and also work independently once a task is assigned



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Experience with California building code (CBC/CRC)

- Experience with residential projects (ADUs, additions, remodels, custom homes)

- Experience with commercial tenant improvement or mixed-use projects

- AutoCAD proficiency as a secondary tool

- Familiarity with Enscape, Lumion, or other rendering tools



How We Work

- Full-time: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (PST) — this is non-negotiable

- You will share your screen live via 
 during work hours — this is how our production team collaborates

- Time is tracked using Hubstaff (screenshots + activity tracking)

- Payment via Wise, monthly

- We use Google Chat and 
 for all team communication

- You will report to a Production Manager who assigns tasks, reviews drawings, and runs daily standups

- This is a long-term role — we are building a team of 5+ Revit professionals



How to Apply — READ CAREFULLY

Include ALL of the following in your application or you will not be considered:

- Put the word "REDLINE" in your subject line so we know you read this entire post

- Attach your resume (PDF preferred)

- Record a short Loom video (1–2 minutes) — open one of your Revit projects on screen and walk us through a construction document set you produced. Show us your CDs, not just renders.

- Include 2–3 samples of US construction document sets you have worked on (PDF or images). We want to see actual CD sheets — floor plans, sections, details, schedules. Remove client names if needed, but we need to see real US permit-level work.

- Your expected hourly rate

- How many years you have worked in Revit and how many US projects you have completed



IMPORTANT: Applications without CD samples will not be considered. We need to see that you can produce US-standard construction documents, not just 3D models or renders.



What Happens After You Apply

If your application is strong, we will message you to schedule a short video call. You should be available to take this call between 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM PST with your camera on and Revit open on your screen. We may reach out the same day, so be ready.

Strong candidates will be given a short paid test project before a final offer is made.

title: N8N Automation Freelancer (Remote, Flexible)
description:
Hey! I run a bunch of YouTube channels. And we constantly need some tools to let us make content faster and save time. Essentially, we want to automate the manual repetitive boring tasks.



Mostly, we build these automations using N8N and Claude. And right now we are looking for a person who can help us to do that.



You do NOT need to be a senior expert for this role.

We’re open to junior-level freelancers as long as you have hands-on experience with N8N and a good understanding of how automations work.



This is not a full-time position, we’re looking for a freelancer we can reach out to whenever we need new automations.



Who This Role Is Perfect For:

-> You have experience building automations using N8N

-> You’ve worked with APIs, webhooks, or custom functions (JavaScript/Python)

-> You can follow simple briefs and build clean, logical flows

-> You’re reliable, respond quickly, and don’t disappear mid-task



What You’ll Do:

-> Build workflows (N8N or sometimes outside of it) that automate manual repetitive tasks (like searching for video ideas, writing scripts for videos, etc…)

-> Help us to save time with automations, with the goal of automating/removing the manual work as much as it’s possible

-> Keep things simple and efficient, no overengineering



Pay & Perks:

-> Task-based payments, based on complexity

-> Fully remote: work from anywhere

-> No meetings or handholding, we send you a task, you deliver the project

-> Ongoing freelance work (weekly or monthly tasks as needed)

-> Opportunity for long-term collaboration as we scale



How to Apply:

Fill out this short application form:




If you know how to build clean N8N automations and want creative flexible work with a team that values speed and simplicity, we’d love to hear from you.



Let’s build better systems together.

title: Growth & Content Operations Assistant (Remote)
description:
Hello,



My name is Dr. J.R. Andrews.



I’m an Army chaplain, former attorney, entrepreneur, and author building several purpose-driven brands including:



• InnerShift360 – faith, personal growth, and culture

• Just Sayin’ – a book and media platform about modern relationships

• South Elm Capital – financial education and life insurance services



In short…



I create content, build businesses, and try to help people live wiser lives.



Just sayin’.



Now here’s the reality.



I’m looking for a sharp digital assistant who can help me operate and grow these platforms.



This is not a basic virtual assistant job where someone just waits for instructions.



I’m looking for someone who can think, organize, and execute.



Someone who enjoys helping build something meaningful.



What You'll Be Helping With



The work will include a mix of creative, operational, and marketing tasks such as:



• Turning written ideas into social media posts and short videos

• Helping organize content calendars

• Assisting with podcast outreach and guest bookings

• Managing simple website updates (WordPress / Elementor)

• Formatting blog posts and newsletters

• Assisting with YouTube, TikTok, and social media uploads

• Helping organize marketing campaigns and lead funnels

• Researching podcasts, influencers, and potential collaborations



Some tasks will be straightforward.



Others will require initiative and curiosity.



If you enjoy figuring things out and making things better, you’ll enjoy this role.



Skills That Would Be Helpful



You don’t need to know everything, but experience with these helps:



• Social media platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn)

• Canva or simple graphic creation

• CapCut or short-form video editing

• WordPress or Elementor

• Google Docs and spreadsheets

• Basic online research



But honestly…



The most important qualities are:



• Organized

• Reliable

• Clear communicator

• Able to think independently



Work Environment



This is a long-term role for the right person.



You’ll be working closely with me helping operate several growing platforms.



My style is straightforward.



I respect people who:



• take initiative

• communicate clearly

• take pride in their work



Compensation



Pay will depend on experience and skill level.



There will be opportunities for long-term work and increased responsibility for someone who proves reliable and capable.



To Apply



Please answer these three questions.



1?? Tell me about a project or task where you had to figure something out on your own.



2?? What digital tools or platforms do you feel most comfortable using?



3?? If you were helping grow a book or media brand online, what is one idea you would try first?



Final Note



I’m not just looking for someone to complete tasks.



I’m looking for someone who enjoys helping build something meaningful.



If that sounds like you, I look forward to hearing from you.



—

Dr. J.R. Andrews

title: AI Automation Specialist
description:
About Us 

We are a high-end, rapidly scaling U.S.-based interior design firm that works with luxury real estate developers, builders, agents, and discerning homebuyers. Our approach blends luxury design with practical, turnkey solutions, leveraging curated vendor partnerships and photo-realistic 3D visualization. We operate at the intersection of high-end design and data-driven operations to maximize our reach and impact.



Role Overview 

We're looking for a systems-minded builder who wants to make a real impact at a fast-growing interior design firm. This is a unique opportunity to work across every part of our business (sales, marketing, design, 3D visualization, fulfillment, and account management), identify where manual processes are slowing us down and build the automated systems to fix them.



This role has real ownership and real scope. You'll work closely with our team, earn trust quickly, and shape what this function looks like as we grow.



Key Responsibilities

* Workflow Mapping: Embed yourself with each team, learn how they actually work, and map the logic required to turn their manual checklists into scalable processes

* Build Automations: Design and deploy automations using 
 and other tools that eliminate repetitive work across our teams

* AI Integration: Use Gemini and Claude to extract insights from unstructured data, draft communications, and stitch together automation workflows that need intelligence in the loop

* Operational Visibility: Connect our tools so data flows automatically (from client onboarding to vendor communications to project tracking to white glove delivery and installation) and do your part to ensure nothing falls through the cracks

* Growth: Expand your scope over time into new areas and workflows



What You Bring

* Proven, hands-on experience building automations - we want to see what you've actually built, not just what you understand in theory

* The ability to look at any business process and map the logic required to automate it

* Comfort working with data management tools like Airtable, Google Sheets, or similar. We care more about how you think about data structure than which specific tool you've used

* 3+ years in operations, automation, or systems roles, ideally supporting a U.S.-based business

* Schedule flexibility to align with PT hours and tea
mbers in the Philippines

* Alignment with our company core values (listed below)



Our Company Core Values

RELATE: Humility, collaboration, and fun in everything we do

DELIVER: Strong work ethic and personal accountability

DELIGHT: Commitment to exceptional client experiences

DISCOVER: Passion for innovation and continuous learning

title: Experienced Accounting VA – QuickBooks Cleanup & Tax Support
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION

*Busy U.S. accountant seeking a reliable Virtual Accounting Assistant to assist with bookkeeping cleanup, tax preparation support, and organization of financial records.

*The role begins with project-based work to confirm skills and working style, with potential for ongoing scheduled work for the right candidate.

*This is a skilled accounting position that requires attention to detail, critical thinking, and the ability to carefully review financial information.



RESPONSIBILITIES

*Bookkeeping cleanup and catch-up work in QuickBooks Online

*Reconcile bank and credit card accounts

*Review financial data and identify inconsistencies or missing transactions

*Prepare summaries and workpapers for tax preparation

*Draft clear client
s requesting information or explaining items



EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS REQUIRED

*5+ years of bookkeeping experience working with business financial records

*Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial terminology

*Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online, including bank feed management and reconciliation troubleshooting

*Experience cleaning up inaccurate or incomplete books (duplicate transactions, uncategorized bank feeds, reconciliation issues, incorrect opening balances)

*Ability to reconcile accounts accurately and investigate discrepancies

*Understanding of tax-sensitive categorization and best practices when posting transactions

*Understanding of Projects and job costing workflows in QuickBooks Online Advanced

*Ability to review QuickBooks automation or AI suggestions to ensure proper categorization

*Strong attention to detail and ability to identify errors or missing information in financial records

*Ability to think critically and identify practical solutions when financial records do not make sense

*Clear written communication skills



SOFT SKILLS

*Highly organized and able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

*Reliable and consistent with communication and follow-through

*Able to work independently and bring structure and prioritization to evolving workloads

*Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills

*Professional written communication when drafting client or business
s (final messages are reviewed before sending)

*Ability to communicate efficiently and work quickly when working with staff, prioritizing clarity and speed over formal wording when communication is internal only

*Advanced English communication skills in both written and spoken form



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

*Reliable high-speed internet connection

*A robust computer capable of running multiple applications

*Dedicated work computer with installed security protections

*Computer and system login must not be shared with other users

*Ability to work with cloud accounting software

*Quiet and professional remote work environment



WORK STRUCTURE

*Position will begin with a paid trial project to confirm skills and working style

*Initial assignments will be gig styles, but there is strong potential for a long-term relationship, either part-time or full-time, depending on skills and strengths, if the working relationship proves to be supportive and productive.

*This role is intended for an individual worker, not an agency or team. Applications from agencies will not be considered.



HOW TO APPLY

*What experience do you have with QuickBooks Online bookkeeping cleanup or catch-up work?

*If a bank balance and QuickBooks balance do not match, what are three things you would check first?

*What is your hourly rate expectation and weekly availability?

*Start your application with the phrase "Detail matters".

*Include the word "Ledger" somewhere in your application.

*Describe your experience or training related to U.S. tax law.

*Tell me one thing you like and one thing that is frustrating about job costing in QuickBooks.

*Why are you interested in this position?

*Describe your computer and technical setup (computer type, processor, RAM, internet speed, etc) and confirm that you use a dedicated work computer that is not shared with others.

*Briefly describe your home office or workspace setup. Photos are encouraged. 

*Are you seeking long-term work, and is your goal eventually part-time or full-time work?



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Influencer Marketing & Social Media Manager (IG + TikTok)
description:
About the Company



We are a US-based, eco-conscious clothing  brand on a mission to redefine comfort. We believe what you wear closest to your skin should be free of toxins and chemicals. We are looking for a dedicated Influencer & Social Media Manager (ideally age 20–26) who understands the "vibe" of modern wellness brands and can turn creators into long-term brand partners.



What You’ll Do



As our Influencer & Social Media Manager, you will be the face and voice of the brand to our partners and community. Your role includes:



- Influencer Research & Recruitment: Find and evaluate influencers who match our non-toxic values. You’ll look at demographics, engagement rates, and content quality to ensure a perfect fit.

- Relationship Management: Build long-term bonds with creators. You’ll be their main point of contact, answering questions and providing support throughout their campaigns.

- Campaign Planning & Execution: Create clear influencer briefs, coordinate product shipments, and manage affiliate links to ensure every launch is a success.

- Content Review & Approval: Quality control is key. You’ll review creator content to ensure it aligns with our brand goals and provide feedback/revisions when necessary.

- Performance Tracking: Monitor reach, engagement, and sales. You’ll prepare reports on which influencers are driving the most value and track affiliate payouts.

- Negotiation & Contracts: Handle the "business" side by negotiating partnership terms, managing usage rights, and ensuring everyone follows advertising disclosure rules.

- Social Media Engagement: Manage our daily presence. This includes Instagram engagement,
 group engagement, and monitoring/responding to DMs. 



What I’m Looking For

 

- Extremely Organized: You’ll be managing multiple campaigns and dozens of influencer conversations at once. Staying on top of spreadsheets and deadlines is a must.

- Great Communication Skills: Both written and verbal. You need to be persuasive when pitching influencers and clear when giving content feedback.

- Please put "Non-Toxic Living" in the title when you apply.

- Self-starter: Someone who is proactive. If you see a trending creator or a new social media feature, you bring it to me first.

- Detail-Oriented: You notice the small things—from a typo in a brief to a missed disclosure tag in an influencer's post.

- Flexible and Adaptable: Able to work in a high-paced environment where priorities can shift with new product launches.

- Positive and Enthusiastic: I want someone who is genuinely excited about clean beauty, health, and wellness.

 



Why This Role is Great for You



- Learning Opportunity: I will teach you the high-level strategy behind US e-commerce, from contract negotiation to high-level marketing analytics.

- Growth Potential: This isn't just a VA role. You are managing a core pillar of our business with a clear, guaranteed salary increase every year.

- Variety: You’ll collaborate with our marketing and PR teams, giving you a 360-degree view of how a brand grows.

- Flexible Schedule: Work when you are most productive, as long as we have our core sync hours.



Requirements



- Strong organizational and project management skills

- Excellent written and verbal English

- Experience with (or a strong desire to learn) influencer platforms and affiliate tracking

- A "digital native" who understands Instagram, TikTok, and
 Group dynamics

- Willingness to learn the technical side of non-toxic textiles and health



If this sounds like the perfect role for you, I’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume along with a voice recording introducing yourself and telling me about an influencer you think would be a great fit for a non-toxic underwear brand.



Looking forward to finding someone amazing to work with!

title: Online PR Manager
description:
About Afina



Afina is a consumer brand focused on improving everyday wellness through better shower water. Our products include filtered shower heads, shower filters, and replacement filters designed to help reduce chlorine and other harsh contaminants that can affect skin, hair, and scalp health. Afina serves a fast-growing customer base and positions shower filtration as part of a modern beauty and self-care routine.  ?



Role Overview



We are hiring an Online PR Manager to grow Afina’s visibility across digital media, beauty, wellness, lifestyle, and consumer product publications. This person will own online PR strategy, manage media outreach, secure earned coverage, build relationships with editors and journalists, and help position Afina as a leading brand in shower filtration, skin wellness, and hair care.



This role is ideal for someone who understands how to turn a consumer product into compelling press angles, can land placements in relevant online publications, and knows how PR supports both brand equity and ecommerce growth.



Responsibilities

 • Build and execute Afina’s online PR strategy

 • Identify and pitch story angles around beauty, skincare, hair wellness, filtered water, self-care, and consumer health

 • Secure earned media placements in beauty, wellness, lifestyle, home, ecommerce, and consumer product publications

 • Build and maintain relationships with journalists, editors, freelance writers, producers, and creators

 • Write press releases, media pitches, founder story briefs, and product launch announcements

 • Support PR for product launches, promotions, partnerships, gifting campaigns, and seasonal 
nts



Requirements

 • 3+ years of experience in digital PR, consumer brand PR, public relations, or communications

 • Proven record of securing coverage in online media

 • Strong relationships with contacts in beauty, wellness, lifestyle, home, or consumer product media

 • Excellent written communication and pitching skills



Preferred

 • Experience working with beauty, personal care, wellness, home, or DTC brands

 • Experience with product gifting / seeding

 • Familiarity with PR and media tools such as Muck Rack, Cision, or similar

 • Understanding of how PR can drive brand awareness, trust, SEO value, and conversion support



Apply Here:

title: Paid ads manager
description:
You'll own and run paid media across Google, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn, and whatever platforms make sense for the business. That means building campaigns from scratch, writing and designing ad creative using Ai, managing budgets, analyzing performance, and making decisions that move revenue, not vanity metrics.



Day to day

- Build, launch, and manage campaigns across Search, Shopping, Display, YouTube, Meta (FB/IG), TikTok, and other paid channels

- Write ad copy, brief creative assets, and concept new ad angles. You should have strong opinions on what makes people click

- Manage budgets across platforms and reallocate spend based on what's actually working

- Set up proper tracking, attribution, and conversion events (GTM, CAPI, UTMs)

- Build and maintain reporting dashboards that tell a clear story, not just dump numbers

- Run A/B tests on creative, audiences, landing pages, bid strategies — always be testing

- Optimize campaigns daily: bids, audiences, placements, creative rotation, negative keywords, exclusions

- Stay current on platform changes, algorithm updates, new ad formats, and policy shifts

- Communicate results and recommendations clearly to stakeholders, no jargon walls





What we're looking for

- 3+ years managing paid media with real budgets (not boosted posts)

- Deep, hands-on experience in Google, Meta, TikTok, and LinkedIn Ads

- Strong creative instincts, you can spot a bad ad and know how to fix it

- Solid grasp of tracking and measurement: GA4, Google Tag Manager, conversion APIs, pixel setup

- Comfortable building reports in Looker Studio, Sheets, or similar tools

- Data-driven but not data-paralyzed, you can make calls with imperfect information

- Experience with landing page testing and CRO is a bonus





This isn't the role for you if

- You only know how to press "Boost Post"

- You need someone to hand you a creative brief for every ad

- You treat reporting as a copy-paste from the platform dashboard

- You can't explain why a campaign is underperforming and what you'd do about it

We are seeking a detail-oriented and tech-savvy Shopify Specialist to manage the backend operations, content management, and website development of our e-commerce platforms. The ideal candidate is organized, analytical, and experienced in handling day-to-day Shopify tasks. You'll ensure clean product data, accurate listings, smooth launches, and performance tracking, playing a key role in optimizing our storefront.

Manage product uploads on Shopify, including SKUs, descriptions, tags, images, and alt text

Perform regular quality checks across desktop and mobile to ensure a smooth UX

Pull and analyze sales data to support merchandising and marketing teams

Monitor reviews and customer feedback for trends and insights

Shopify

ClickUp

Various Shopify apps

Advanced spreadsheet/reporting skills and analytical mindset

Experience with Shopify backend and apps

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Highly organized and proactive with excellent attention to detail

Fast learner with new tools and platforms

Prior experience with direct-to-consumer (DTC) or US-based e-commerce brands is a plus

title: Paid Google Ads Specialist
description:
We are looking for a Google Ads Specialist to manage, optimize, and scale performance-driven campaigns across Google’s ecosystem. This role focuses exclusively on Google Ads and is ideal for someone who is analytical, data-driven, and results-oriented.



You will work closely with strategy, creative, and analytics teams to deliver measurable growth for brands across multiple industries and global markets.



 Your Responsibilities



Plan, launch, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max)



Monitor performance daily and turn data into clear, actionable insights



Optimize budgets, bidding strategies, keywords, audiences, and creatives to improve CPA, ROAS, CTR, and conversion rates



Conduct A/B testing on ad copy, creatives, landing pages, and campaign structures



Manage and improve conversion tracking using Google Analytics & Google Tag Manager

title: Office Manager — Client-Facing Phone Role | US Architecture & Construction Firm | Full-Time 9–5 PST
description:
We are a US-based architecture and construction company looking for a sharp, confident Office Manager who will be the voice of our firm on the phone with American clients.



This is not a typical VA role. You will answer and make calls as our office, collect payments, coordinate with clients and city departments, and keep our projects moving forward.



If you have BPO or call center experience on a US account and want a role where you actually represent a real business and build real relationships — this is it.



What You'll Do

- Answer and make phone calls as "Drams Architects" and "Drams Construction" using our US phone number (Google Voice)

- Call clients to collect payments, provide project updates, and schedule meetings

- Follow up with building departments, engineers, and subcontractors on deliverables

- Manage the calendar — schedule meetings, send invites, coordinate availability

- Triage
 — flag urgent items, handle routine responses

- Track outstanding invoices and follow up until paid

- Record client requests and follow through until resolved — nothing gets dropped



Who You Are

- Excellent spoken English with a clear, neutral American accent

- BPO, call center, or phone-based customer service experience (US account preferred)

- Confident, professional, and warm on the phone — clients trust you immediately

- Proactive — you follow up without being asked

- Organized and reliable — you track what you've done and what's pending

- Comfortable with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Google Chat)

- Comfortable using AI tools to work faster (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

- Can work independently with minimal supervision once trained



How We Work

- Full-time: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (PST) — this is non-negotiable

- You will share your screen live via 
 during work hours

- Time is tracked using Hubstaff (screenshots + activity tracking)

- Payment via Wise, monthly 

- We use Google Chat and 
 for all team communication

- This is a long-term role — we are building a team, not looking for temporary help



How to Apply — READ CAREFULLY

Include ALL of the following in your application or you will not be considered:



- Put the word "BLUEPRINT" in your subject line so we know you read this entire post

- Attach your resume link (PDF preferred)

- Record a 1–2 minute Loom video introducing yourself in English — tell us about your experience and why you want this role (paste the Loom link in your application)

- Your expected hourly rate

- Your BPO or phone-based work experience — which accounts, how long, what you did



What Happens After You Apply

If your application is strong, we will message you to schedule a short video call. You should be available to take this call between 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM PST with your camera on and in a quiet environment. We may reach out the same day, so be ready.

This is a phone-first role — how you sound and present yourself on the call IS the interview.

title: Bilingual Medical Expert
description:
Job Title: Bilingual Medical Expert

Job Type: Contract (Full-time or Part-time)

Location: Remote



Job Summary:



Join our customer's team as a Bilingual Medical Expert and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of AI-driven healthcare. In this intellectually stimulating role, you will design complex, verifiable, and time-resistant medical question–answer pairs from multiple reputable sources to rigorously train next-generation AI models. This is an exceptional opportunity to blend your clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology, directly impacting the accuracy and reliability of AI in medicine.







Key Responsibilities:



- Create challenging, knowledge-based medical question–answer pairs that address gaps in current AI capabilities.

- Research and synthesize content from obscure yet reliable medical sources to formulate questions and justifications.

- Ensure all questions are verifiable, evidence-based, and maintain longevity in relevance.

- Provide detailed, source-backed rationales for each answer to support knowledge traceability.

- Collaborate closely with AI development and data teams to refine training methodologies and improve model performance.

- Communicate findings and complex medical concepts clearly and concisely in both written and verbal formats.

- Continuously monitor advancements in medical science and AI to update content and maintain best practices.





Required Skills and Qualifications:



- Advanced proficiency in Next.js and modern web application development.

- Fluency in at least two languages, with strong command of medical terminology in both.

- Demonstrated experience in medical research, clinical practice, or academic medicine.

- Exceptional written and verbal communication skills with meticulous attention to clarity and detail.

- Ability to identify AI limitations and design questions that reveal knowledge gaps.

- Strong analytical skills and the capacity to synthesize complex information from diverse sources.

- Self-motivated, proactive, and able to thrive in a fully remote environment.





Preferred Qualifications:



- Prior experience in AI training, prompt engineering, or medical informatics.

- Familiarity with multi-source data validation and knowledge engineering.

- Publication or peer review experience in a medical or scientific context.

title: L2 Tech Support Engineer
description:
Dear Technology Lover!

We're a small (but VERY efficient) 20-year-old MSP based in Arizona.

As a small company. we're VERY employee-focused, and believe that our tea
mbers are our MOST IMPORTANT ASSET!



Here are some of the things you can expect from working with us:

• Ongoing (monthly) manager review and feedback- you should never guess where you are "standing" and what you, AND THE COMPANY, can do better!

• Paid certifications- we will pay for your courses, and tests and allocate time during business hours to help you achieve your desired goals

• Paid Time Off- it's important to us that you are happy, healthy, and have a work-life balance!

• Bonuses- when the company wins- you win!

• Raises- As we grow, we believe you should as well. We have to stay competitive as an employer to retain our awesome employees!

• Opportunities to grow- In our industry, we can't be on "cruise control"... We need to push our tea
mbers to stay ahead of the technology curve. Help you continually to sharpen your skills with a focus on your career aspirations.

• Paid sick days- We understand life happens. We don't want you to feel that you have to drag yourself to work sick if your body tells you to relax...



You're the right fit if you:

• LOVE learning, working with, and experimenting with new technology

• Get excited when you save someone's day and provide great service

• Are a hard-working fun person, and see yourself being in the IT industry for the foreseeable future

• Want to work in a GROWING environment, with STABLE income, Bonuses, and a great attitude!

• Want the opportunity to advance and learn more!



Some of the responsibilities that your position will include are:

Helpdesk (mostly escalations, but some basic if needed), cyber security related tasks/ audits, cloud hosting and virtualization (HyperV, SonicWall, VPN), MS365 management and automation, BCDR (Axcient), networking (Unifi, Sonicwall), IT projects, Servers maintenance (Windows only), scripts creation, testing new technology and other tasks related to IT.



IMPORTANT:

This position requires AT LEAST 2 years of MSP experience and at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory, or lead role. 100% clean background check, highly organized, technologically savvy, and can work diligently with little 
veral hiring steps will take place to verify the above requirements, including reference checking, employment verification, technical testing, and more.



Minimum technical level that you will need to be able to pass a test on:

• Explaining to a non-technical person what the "cloud" is

• Consulting with a new client on what BCDR solution you would recommend to an SMB, and why

• Explaining what the differences are between traditional anti-virus and XDR

• Creating a new Virtual Machine on Hyper-V host, from an ISO file located on a different computer on the network.

• Explaining the differences and commonalities between SharePoint and OneDrive.

• Creating an Intune policy that will install Firefox on an Azure-joined VM, and make Firefox the default browser, with the specific home page we'll provide to you during the test.

• Several other situational and technical questions.

• CCNA certificate candidates preferred but not required.



MORE DETAILS:

• A PRE-EMPLOYMENT BACKGROUND CHECK is performed (at our expense). You must have 100% clean background check. Please do not apply if you don't have 100% clean background check.

• Personality is KEY for us. We are looking for an easy-going, yet professional, friendly and HONEST person.

• You will be working from home. This means you must have a quiet work environment and no excessive background noise.

• FAST AND RELIABLE INTERNET SERVICE IS REQUIRED With at least 100Mbps download speed  20+Mbps upload speed.

• As part of this position requirement, you must have a computer that will be used exclusively for your work with us. This means we will be installing our security software on that computer, will remove admin rights from you, and monitor/ control it for security and compliance reasons. In return, we will pay you additional “rent” fees, on top of your salary, in the amount of several hundred dollars. Details about this “rental” will be discussed during your second interview. There are minimum requirements that your computer must have, in order to be employed with us. You must have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 minimum 9th gen processor (preferably a newer one) with 16 GB RAM or more or Ryzen 5/7 (MUST include TPM support) as well as Windows 11 OS.

• You must have recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more.

• We evaluate/ review employees monthly and provide consistent feedback.

• We offer raises and bonuses according to performance, certifications, attitude, and customer reviews twice/ year.

• Your manager (our IT director) will create a roadmap for your "KPIs" and certifications track. We always push our team to earn certifications and additional knowledge – even allowing “disconnect study time” during business hours!

• On-call rotation (after-hours) for a week at a time, once every 4-5 weeks. It's VERY rare that we get calls after-hours (the average is only twice/ year!).

• We're closed on major US holidays, and at the completion of the first 3 months of employment, you'll qualify for paid holidays.

• Work hours are Mon-Fri at 8 am till 5:30 pm (UTC-07:00 , MST, Arizona time zone)

• Every 4 to 5 weeks, you'll be working 1/2 day on a Saturday (project work/catch-up work) and get 1/2 day off the week after

• Mandatory 1-hour lunch and additional breaks (as you need those) throughout the day.

• Further details and information will be discussed with qualified candidates.



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED:

• REQUIRED: Relevant minimum 2 YEARS experience working for an MSP

• REQUIRED: With AT LEAST 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role.

• REQUIRED: Microsoft Azure AD/ M365 experience

• REQUIRED: Experience working with an RMM and PSA software (DATTO preferred)

• Preferred: Cyber Security education/experience

• Preferred: Hyper-V experience



Other tools we use:

Barracuda DNS filter, AutoElevate, Cylance, Infocyte, Syxsense, IT Glue, SonicWall, Unifi, and more



HOW TO APPLY?



Answer the questions below, or you may also send an
 to 
 with the subject line "L2 Tech Support - Feb2026" with your answers:



- An attachment of your resume in PDF format/ link of you resume if you will send us a message.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you have a 100% clean background with no criminal history.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you understand the business hours (MST\ Arizona time zone.



Answer the following questions:

1. How many years of experience do you have working in an MSP company? Name of the MSP company/s you worked with.

2. Do you have at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role?

3. Do you have experience working with RMM and PSA software? What applications did you use?

4. Do you have experience working with Virtualization, servers, GPO, TCP/IP, hyper-v/vmware, conditional access, Intune, and Scripting such as PowerShell?

5. Have you recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more? What time zone and when?

6. Are you okay with the computer requirements and the rental arrangement described in the job details?

7. Do you have an internet speed of at least 100Mbps download speed and  20+ upload speed?



We're looking forward to having you join our family!

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
About US

We are growing online membership community dedicated to connecting, supporting, and empowering its members. We operate fully in the digital space and are passionate about using technology to deliver exceptional member experiences. As we scale, we are looking for a talented Digital Marketing Specialist to help us grow our community, automate our workflows, and deliver world-class digital experiences.

 

Role Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled and self-motivated Digital Marketing Specialist based in the Philippines to join our remote team. In this role, you will be the driving force behind our digital presence — from building landing pages and automating workflows in Go High Level (GHL), to managing our membership community, creating content, and scheduling social media. You must be comfortable working independently, meeting deadlines, and leveraging AI tools to work smarter and faster.

 

Key Responsibilities

Go High Level (GHL) Platform Management

• Build, test, and optimise landing pages and opt-in forms within GHL

• Design and maintain simple websites and funnel pages

• Configure and manage GHL backend workflows, automations, and pipelines

• Integrate and manage electronically signed documents (e.g. HelloSign / DocuSign) within GHL workflows

• Set up and maintain CRM pipelines, contact tagging, and segmentation

• Troubleshoot and optimise existing automations and funnels

 

Membership & Community Management

• Manage all aspects of the b1ofus online membership platform

• Onboard new members and ensure a smooth member journey from sign-up to active participation

• Monitor, moderate, and engage with member posts and discussions

• Handle member support queries and escalate issues where required

• Track member engagement and report on community health metrics

• Implement retention strategies to reduce churn and increase lifetime member value

title: Operations VA — Proposals, Contracts & Project Tracking | US Architecture & Construction Firm | Full-Time 9–5 PST
description:
Post Body:

We are a US-based architecture and construction company looking for a detail-oriented Operations VA to run our back office. You will prepare proposals, draft contracts, track project timelines, organize documentation, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.



This is a behind-the-scenes role — you will not be on the phone with clients. Your job is to make sure everything the business sends out is professional, accurate, and on time.



If you love systems, spreadsheets, checklists, and making order out of chaos — this is your role.



What You'll Do

- Draft proposals and contracts in Google Docs using AI tools and templates we provide

- Send proposals and contracts for e-signature, track status, and follow up until signed

- Maintain a pipeline tracker — every lead, proposal, project, and deadline in one place

- Track permit status, plan check timelines, and city/engineer correspondence

- Organize Google Drive — maintain clean, consistent folder structures per project and entity

- Prepare project documents: transmittals, RFIs, submittals, meeting notes

- Collect and track vendor documentation — insurance certs, lien waivers, W-9s

- Coordinate with the team on deliverables and deadlines

- Use AI tools daily to draft, research, and improve efficiency



Who You Are

- Excellent written English — professional, clear, error-free

- Extremely detail-oriented — you catch typos, missing attachments, and inconsistencies

- Organized and systematic — you create and maintain trackers, checklists, and SOPs

- Comfortable with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail, Calendar)

- Actively use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) and see them as essential, not optional

- Proactive — you flag problems before they become emergencies

- Work independently once trained — you don't need daily supervision



How We Work

- Full-time: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (PST) — this is non-negotiable

- You will share your screen live via 
 during work hours

- Time is tracked using Hubstaff (screenshots + activity tracking)

- Payment via Wise, monthly

- We use Google Chat and 
 for all team communication

- This is a long-term role — we are building a team, not looking for temporary help



How to Apply — READ CAREFULLY

Include ALL of the following in your application or you will not be considered:

- Put the word "CORNERSTONE" in your subject line so we know you read this entire post

- Attach your resume (PDF preferred)

- Record a short Loom video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself — tell us about your experience with document preparation and how you use AI in your work (paste the Loom link in your application)

- Your expected hourly rate

- One example of how you've used AI in your work (any tool — Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.)



- BONUS: If you have a sample document, tracker, or system you've built, include a link. We want to see how you think and organize.



What Happens After You Apply

If your application is strong, we will message you to schedule a short video call. You should be available to take this call between 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM PST with your camera on and in a quiet environment. We may reach out the same day, so be ready.

Your application itself is the first test — if it has typos or is disorganized, that tells us everything we need to know.

title: Reddit Guerrilla Marketer (Agency Growth & Social Listening)
description:
I run 
. We’ve built a high-end data engine that scrapes new Florida business filings and appends the founder’s direct phone and personal
. It’s a "goldmine" for web designers and agencies who want to reach founders before their business cards are even printed.



I’m looking for a "Reddit Detective" to help me find our customers where they hang out. I don't want a "spammer." I want someone who knows how to be the most helpful person in the thread.



The "Must-Haves":



Aged Accounts: You need to have at least one (ideally 2-3) aged Reddit accounts (1+ year old) with 500+ karma. We need to be able to hit the ground running on Monday without being caught in "new user" filters.



Western Conversational Tone: You need to write like a peer. If you sound like a salesperson or a bot, you’ll get banned. If you sound like a helpful agency owner, you’ll win.



Social Listening: You’ll use tools to track keywords like "Sunbiz," "Florida leads," and "how to get web design clients." When someone asks a question, you show up with a high-value answer and a "by the way" link to our free sample.



What you’ll be doing:



Monitor: Living in subreddits like r/agency, r/webdesign, and r/sales.



Engage: Writing 5-10 high-quality, long-form comments per day that actually solve people’s problems.



Strategy: Helping me build "DayOneFeed" personas that become authority figures in the space.



Reporting: Keeping a simple sheet of where you posted and how many clicks/leads we got.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Marketing Manager — Polygon AI (Remote, Philippines)

Location: Remote, Philippines

Commitment: 1–2 days per week (8–16 hours), with a clear path to full-time by end of 2026

Reports to: Co-founders



About Us

Polygon AI is a Swiss startup that builds vertical software products powered by AI. We're two co-founders — an ex-Google Technical Program Manager with 25 years in systems engineering, and an AI/NLP researcher and PhD candidate at the University of Zurich — and we've recently launched two B2B products into distinctly different markets.

SparkDesk (sparkdesk.ai) is an AI-powered voice and text receptionist for hotels. It handles room bookings, spa reservations, and dining arrangements through natural conversations in 57 languages, integrates directly with Mews (a leading property management system), detects emotional tone, and handles mid-sentence interruptions. It's built to replace the clunky IVR systems hotels still force their guests through. We're targeting hotels across Europe, starting with the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland).

SurgeTix (surgetix.com) is ticketing infrastructure built specifically for film festivals. It handles 100K+ concurrent users with sub-30ms seat reservation latency, maps complex cinema seating layouts (curved balconies, staggered rows, accessibility zones), generates NFC-enabled Apple and Google Wallet passes, and runs fully white-labeled on the festival's own domain. We're targeting multi-venue film festivals in Europe, starting with the DACH region.

Both products are live. Both serve niche B2B audiences that generic marketing won't reach. That's where you come in.



The Role

We're looking for a marketing generalist who can own our digital presence across both products and help us build early commercial traction. You'll work directly with both co-founders — no layers, no approval committees, no middlemen.

This is a part-time engagement to start (1–2 days per week), growing into a full-time role by end of year as both products scale. We'll ramp scope gradually and together — you won't be expected to do everything from day one. Here's how we see priorities evolving:

Phase 1 (Months 1–2): Foundation. Audit our current web presence and social channels, including a full revamp concept for polygon-ai.com (our company site needs a fresh direction — you'll own the strategy and messaging recommendations, while implementation stays with the engineering team). Set up analytics and tracking. Develop a content calendar and publish initial content on LinkedIn. Conduct keyword research for both products and identify quick SEO wins. Get familiar with both markets and competitive landscapes.

Phase 2 (Months 2–4): Rhythm. Run consistent social media across LinkedIn and other relevant channels. Publish SEO-driven content targeting high-intent keywords — "AI hotel receptionist," "film festival ticketing platform," "white-label event ticketing," "Mews PMS integration," and similar. Propose and test landing page improvements. Begin competitor tracking.

Phase 3 (Months 4+): Scale. Expand to additional channels and content formats. Drive measurable organic growth. Contribute market and audience insights to product and positioning decisions. Take on broader go-to-market responsibilities as the role grows toward full-time.

The core challenge is genuinely interesting: two B2B products, two completely different verticals (hospitality and cultural events), two distinct buyer personas. For SparkDesk you're speaking to hotel general managers and front office directors who feel the pain of missed calls and overwhelmed reception desks. For SurgeTix you're reaching film festival directors and operations managers who've been burned by generic ticketing platforms that crash during on-sale drops or can't map their historic cinema venues. Same marketing discipline, different languages and hooks.



What We're Looking For

Three to five years of hands-on experience in digital marketing, content, or growth — ideally working with international clients, B2B SaaS companies, or startups where you owned outcomes, not just tasks. You can write clean, persuasive English copy that sounds natural and specific — not templated or keyword-stuffed. You understand SEO beyond the basics and have worked with tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Google Search Console. You're comfortable with Google Analytics and interpreting data from social platforms. You have enough design instinct to produce solid social media assets in Canva, Figma, or equivalent. Most importantly, you're self-directed — at 1–2 days per week with a European team, you need to set your own priorities and move without constant check-ins.

Extra valuable but not required: experience marketing B2B SaaS or vertical software for European or North American markets. Familiarity with the hospitality tech ecosystem or the events/ticketing space. Short-form video and product demo skills. A personal brand or social presence you've built yourself.

German fluency is a significant asset. Both products target the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland) first, and the ability to create content and engage prospects in German would meaningfully accelerate our go-to-market. If you speak German, make sure to highlight this in your application.



What We Offer

Real ownership. You're not executing someone else's playbook. At our stage, what you build becomes the foundation for how both products go to market.

Direct founder access. You'll communicate directly with both co-founders. No agency middlemen, no account managers — just the people who built the products.

International B2B experience. You'll market Swiss-built products to European hotel chains and film festivals. That's portfolio-level work that's hard to get in most remote marketing roles.

AI-native environment. You'll work alongside a team that builds and ships AI products daily. The exposure and skills you'll develop here go well beyond typical marketing experience.

Path to full-time. This starts part-time by design, but the trajectory is clear. As both products grow through 2026, so does the role — and we'd rather grow someone into a Head of Marketing than hire one later.

Reliable, professional engagement. Swiss company, structured payments, clear expectations. We treat contractors as partners, not disposable labor.



How to Apply

Send an
 to 
 with:



A short note on why this role interests you (a few sentences, not an essay).

Your CV and LinkedIn profile (we review both).

Two LinkedIn posts — one for SparkDesk targeting hotel operations managers, one for SurgeTix targeting film festival directors. This should take about 30 minutes and tells us more than any resume.



We reply to every application. No ghosting.

title: Junior Media Buyer – FB, Google & TikTok (Full-Time, Execution-Focused)
description:

Schedule: EST-aligned preferred

Start: Paid test ? Long-term opportunity



What This Role Is Really About



We are looking for a hands-on Junior Media Buyer who enjoys working directly inside ad accounts and improving performance through consistent execution.



This role is ideal for someone who loves:



Launching campaigns quickly



Working inside ad accounts every day



Testing new creatives, audiences, and messaging angles



Improving cost per lead (CPL) through practical optimization



This is not a strategy-only role and not a “set it and forget it” position.



You will be actively managing and optimizing campaigns daily.



Core Responsibilities

 & Instagram Ads

TikTok Ads



Create and duplicate ad sets efficiently

CPL

Campaigns are launched the same day, not delayed for days or weeks

Execution matters more than opinions.

 Ads Manager

, Google, TikTok)

title: Youtube shorts editor
description:
ob Title: YouTube Shorts Video Editor (Long-Term Project – Up to 1000 Shorts)



Company Overview

We are looking for a skilled and creative video editor to help produce a large portfolio of YouTube Shorts. This will be a long-term project with the goal of creating up to 1000 short-form videos for YouTube.



Role Overview

The selected candidate will be responsible for editing engaging YouTube Shorts from provided content. You must have your own editing software, tools, and workflow and be capable of delivering completed short-form videos ready for upload.



Responsibilities



Edit and produce engaging YouTube Shorts (vertical 9:16 format)



Create attention-grabbing edits that retain viewer attention



Add subtitles, captions, sound effects, and visual elements when appropriate



Ensure videos are optimized for YouTube Shorts



Deliver completed videos in an organized format



Send all completed shorts directly after editing for review



Project Scope



Up to 1000 YouTube Shorts in total



Ongoing/long-term work depending on performance



Potential for future projects if the collaboration works well



Requirements



Proven experience editing short-form content (YouTube Shorts, TikTok, or Reels)



Must have your own editing software and tools



Ability to deliver high-quality, fast-paced edits



Good understanding of viral short-form content



Reliable internet connection and ability to send files consistently



Strong communication and ability to follow instructions



Nice to Have



Experience with viral YouTube channels



Knowledge of audience retention techniques



Motion graphics or advanced captioning skills



To Apply

Please include:



Links to previous YouTube Shorts or short-form content you have edited



What software/tools you use for editing



How many shorts you can realistically produce per week



We are looking for someone reliable, creative, and capable of handling a large project. If the quality is good, there will likely be ongoing work available. A Profit share scheme will also be in place.

title: US Senior Accountant
description:
I am looking for a tech-savvy, detail-obsessed Senior Accountant to support me — mainly in the trades and construction industries. 



This role is ideal for someone with a strong U.S. accounting background, a QBO ProAdvisor certification, and experience managing multiple client accounts. If you love spreadsheets, job costing, and solving problems before they become issues — this is for you.



You’ll Succeed If You Have:



5+ years of accounting experience

1+ year of US Accounting background

1+ year of QuickBooks Online experience

QBO ProAdvisor certification (preferred)

Strong understanding of GAAP

Experience working remotely with U.S. clients

Confidence juggling multiple client accounts

Great communication and client service skills

Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills

Bonus: Experience in the home services or construction industries

QuickBooks Online

Work from home

How extensive is your experience with month-end closing?

Work Location: Remote

title: Interior Designer
description:
About Us

We are a high-end, rapidly scaling U.S.-based interior design firm that works with luxury real estate developers, builders, agents, and discerning homebuyers. Our approach blends luxury design with practical, turnkey solutions, leveraging curated vendor partnerships and photo-realistic 3D visualization. We operate at the intersection of high-end design and data-driven operations to maximize our reach and impact.



Role Overview

We're looking for a talented interior designer who takes real pride in their work and thrives in a fast-moving environment. This is a creative role, but speed and efficiency matter as much as the quality of the output. You'll take design direction and run with it, translating concepts into polished, client-ready presentations while keeping multiple projects moving at once. We can get you up to speed on our tools and workflow, but taste, attention to detail, and the drive to make every project genuinely beautiful - that has to come with you.



We're also building a design team that stays ahead of the curve. That means actively using AI and emerging tools to work smarter, produce faster, and push the quality of our output higher. If you get excited about what new technology makes possible in design, you'll fit right in here.



Key Responsibilities

* Design Concepts: Develop design concepts drawing from our curated vendor catalog or our own previous collections, creating cohesive looks that reflect each client's space and aesthetic

* Presentations: Build concept boards, material samples, and design plans that tell a clear visual story, then present those concepts to clients and gather feedback

* 3D Modeling: Create and complete SketchUp models of rooms and furniture that feed into our 3D Artist team for final client renderings

* Project Management: Own your projects from design through handoff to our fulfillment team, stepping in when swaps are needed and following up with clients after install

* Project Organization: Keep project files, design selections, and procurement trackers organized and current so nothing falls through the cracks



What You Bring

* A strong design eye and genuine passion for interior design. Degree or formal training in interior design is required and your portfolio should speak for itself

* Excitement about using AI tools and a track record of adopting new technology to work more efficiently

* The ability to juggle multiple projects simultaneously, hit tight deadlines, and communicate clearly when priorities shift

* A collaborative working style. This team wins together and everyone contributes

* Proficiency in SketchUp for room and furniture modeling

* Polished written and spoken English, clear and professional in client-facing settings and team collaboration

* Alignment with our company core values (listed below)



Our Company Core Values

RELATE: Humility, collaboration, and fun in everything we do

DELIVER: Strong work ethic and personal accountability

DELIGHT: Commitment to exceptional client experiences

DISCOVER: Passion for innovation and continuous learning



Schedule

This is a full-time role. We're flexible on hours but ask that you have meaningful overlap with our U.S. Pacific Time mornings and availability during Philippine overnight hours to collaborate with the team.

title: Part-Time Graphic Designer For Social Media
description:
Are you a graphic designer who loves creating social media content? Keep reading! 



We’re looking for a creative, part-time graphic designer to help create and strategize Instagram Stories content for our clients so they can generate more leads, grow their
 lists, and drive sales from their audiences.



These stories may include promoting lead magnets, highlighting offers, sharing case studies and testimonials, and other content designed to convert followers into customers.



This role requires more than just design skills. You’ll also need basic copywriting ability to craft story messaging that feels natural, engaging, and clear.



==About Us==



Flowlync is a fast-growing social media marketing agency that helps business owners and experts grow their personal brands online and turn their audience into real business growth.



Our team creates content that generates millions of views every month, and we’re looking for talented, motivated people who want to be part of a high-performing team.



==What You’ll Be Doing==



You will:



- Design Instagram story graphics for multiple clients

- Write short, engaging copy for the story slides

- Create story sequences that encourage followers to click links or reply, or sign up for lead magnets

- Design story graphics that feel organic to Instagram (not overly corporate or ad-like)

- Collaborate with our team to improve story strategies and performance

- Organize and deliver designs through Google Drive



==Requirements==



To be considered for this role, you must:



- Be available part-time (20 hours per week)

- Have at least 2 years of graphic design experience for social media

- Be fluent in written and spoken English

- Have reliable internet (minimum 200 Mbps)

- Be comfortable using Google Drive and collaborating remotely



==What We’re Looking For==



You might be a great fit if you:



- Have a good understanding of social media and how Instagram stories work

- Understand how to design stories that feel natural and organic

- Are creative and detail-oriented

- Take ownership of your work and deadlines

- Are organized and proactive

- Constantly look for ways to improve your designs and strategies



==How To Apply For This Role===



Please fill out this application form:







Important: We will only review applications submitted through the above form. If you don't complete the form, we will not see your application.

title: Full-Time Video Editor (For Short-form Content)
description:
If you love editing engaging TikToks/Instagram Reels, this is the perfect role for you! 



We’re looking for a full-time video editor to join our fast-growing team and help create content that generates millions of views on social media every month.



==About Us==



Flowlync is a social media marketing agency that helps business owners grow their personal brands online and grow their business. We handle the full content production process from ideation to editing and posting. 



We’re growing quickly and are looking for talented editors who want to be part of a high-performance team and grow within the company long-term. 



==What You’ll Be Doing==



As a Video Editor, you will:



• Edit short-form talking-head videos for social media (TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts)

• Turn raw recordings from clients into engaging edited videos

• Work with clear daily deadlines and deliverables

• Manage editing for a set group of clients

• Collaborate with our team to improve content performance



==Requirements==



To be considered, you must:



• Be available full-time (40 hours per week)

• Work exclusively with our company

• Have at least 2 years of short-form video editing experience

• Be fluent in written and spoken English

• Use Adobe Premiere Pro

• Have reliable internet (minimum 200 Mbps)

• Comfortable using Google Drive 

• Fast computer to ensure fast export times and smooth editing 



==What We’re Looking For==



You will be a GREAT fit if you:



• Have a strong sense of what makes content go viral on social media

• Are creative and detail-oriented

• Take ownership of your work and deadlines

• Are organized and proactive

• Constantly look for ways to improve your edits

• Open to feedback and growing your skills



==How To Apply For This Role===



Please fill out this application form:



Important: We will only review applications submitted through the above form. If you don't complete the form, we will not see your application.

title: Short Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a reliable, skilled Video Editor to join our workflow. We have a consistent and growing need for high-quality video content, and we are looking for someone who can grow with us.



This role will start as a paid, gig-based trial (1 to 2 videos) so we can see how we work together. If you can deliver great quality and hit the deadlines, this will quickly transition into a consistent part-time role, with the ultimate goal of bringing you on full-time.



The Workflow

We keep things simple. For every project, you will receive:

1. The Raw Footage: All the clips you need to build the video.

2. The Reference Video: A clear example of the style, pacing, and aesthetic we are looking for.



Your job is to take the raw footage and edit it to match the vibe and quality of the reference provided.



What We’re Looking For



- Sharp Eye for References: You can watch a reference video, understand exactly what makes it work (the cuts, the pacing, the audio), and replicate that style using our raw footage.



- Prompt & Reliable: You respect deadlines, communicate clearly, and can turn around projects efficiently without sacrificing quality.



- High-Quality Output: Clean cuts, balanced audio, and a polished final product.



Bonus Points:

We will heavily favor candidates with strong experience in social media video editing. If you know how to make a video catchy and punchy - using strong hooks, dynamic pacing, engaging captions, and trends to hold a viewer's attention - you will stand out immediately.



How to Apply



Please send over:



1) A brief introduction.

2) 2-3 links to your best video editing work (specifically social media or punchy, short-form content if you have it).

3) Your typical turnaround time for a 60 to 90-second video.

title: Full Stack Developer (AI-Assisted Development)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled AI-Assisted Full Stack Developer who can rapidly build and deploy applications using modern AI development tools. The ideal candidate must be highly proficient in Lovable and capable of developing both frontend and backend systems efficiently.



In this role, you will be responsible for turning ideas into functional products quickly, building scalable web applications, and integrating APIs and backend services. You should be comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where rapid prototyping and continuous iteration are essential.



A strong sense of frontend design and user interface experience is also important. While the role is primarily focused on full stack development, the ability to create clean, intuitive, and visually appealing interfaces is highly valued.



You should be confident working independently, solving technical challenges, and leveraging AI-assisted development tools to improve productivity and speed. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and committed to delivering high-quality applications.



Requirements:



Expert-level proficiency in Lovable (required)

Strong Full Stack Development experience (frontend and backend)

Ability to build and ship applications using AI-assisted development workflows

Strong frontend design sense and ability to create clean, user-friendly interfaces

Experience integrating APIs, databases, and third-party services

Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently





If you believe you are a good fit for this role, please complete our application form. After the shortlisting process, selected candidates will be contacted via
 and Google Chat for the next stage of the application. Thank you.

title: U.S. Corporate Tax Specialist - CPA
description:
About the Company



We are a small U.S. corporation incorporated in Nevada with two U.S. founders and one foreign shareholder (40% ownership).



Because the company has a foreign owner with more than 25% ownership, we believe we are required to file Form 5472 along with our Form 1120 corporate tax return.



We are looking for a U.S. tax professional to help prepare these filings and provide guidance on proper compliance and documentation.





Responsibilities



You will assist with:

 • Preparing and filing Form 1120 (U.S. Corporate Tax Return)

 • Preparing and filing Form 5472 for the foreign shareholder

 • Filing Form 7004 to request a filing extension if necessary

 • Reviewing any reportable transactions between the company and the foreign shareholder

 • Advising on proper documentation of shareholder expenses and reimbursements

 • Ensuring compliance with IRS requirements for corporations with foreign ownership

 • Providing general tax and compliance guidance for the company





Company Context

 • Nevada C-Corporation

 • 2 U.S. founders

 • 1 foreign shareholder (40% ownership)

 • Early-stage startup

 • Some early company expenses were paid personally by founders (their companies)





Requirements



Mandatory

 • CPA (Certified Public Accountant) OR Enrolled Agent (EA)

 • Proven experience preparing Form 1120

 • Proven experience preparing Form 5472

 • Experience working with U.S. corporations with foreign shareholders

 • Ability to advise on reportable transactions and shareholder reimbursements

 • Strong knowledge of IRS corporate tax compliance

 • Professional English

 • Experience with Zoho books





Preferred Experience

 • Experience with startup companies

 • Experience working with international shareholders

 • Experience supporting remote companies

 • Familiarity with Nevada corporations





Deliverables

 • Preparation and filing of:

 • Form 1120

 • Form 5472

 • Form 7004 (if needed)

 • Guidance on proper documentation of shareholder expenses

 • Compliance guidance related to foreign ownership reporting





How to Apply



Please include:

 1. Your CPA or EA license

 2. Your experience with Form 5472 filings

 3. How many Form 5472 filings you prepare each year

 4. Your estimated cost for preparing:

 • Form 1120

 • Form 5472

 5. Your availability for a short consultation call





Important



Please apply only if you have direct experience with Form 5472 filings.



Please end your message with a smiley face to show us you read to the end. Thank you.

title: SHOPIFY DEVELOPER — E-COMMERCE OPERATIONS |  APEX VELOCITY
description:

We are looking for a Shopify Developer to help us set up and customize Shopify stores for client projects.
